name: Tim Burchett
subject: Pray for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, Join me in praying for President Trump. While the exact details of what happened at the rally in Pennsylvania are still emerging, it's clear that an attempt was made to seriously hurt President Trump. This is America, folks. Political violence in any form is unacceptable. We should be able to gather in support of our candidates without fearing for our safety. I’m deeply saddened and disgusted by what happened, and I’m praying for President Trump during this disturbing moment in our nation’s history. Thank you to the Secret Service and all other responding law enforcement officers who leaped into action to protect President Trump and everyone in attendance. Again, please pray for God to put his healing hands on President Trump and everyone else who may have been hurt in this incident. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Tim Burchett
---
| | |
---
**Stay in Touch 👇** **Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Re: Shooting at Trump Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dr
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Header.png]
Bob Lorinser for Congress
bob@votedrbob.com [info@votedrbob.com]
906.250.9774 [info@votedrbob.com]
OFFICIAL STATEMENT
Sat. July 13, 2024
"I deeply condemn today's horrific act of violence. A shooting at Trump — with others critically injured — shows a troubling trend in our nation. America must be better than this. This isn't about politics; it's about the soul of our country.
"I wish Trump and those affected well, and I'm thankful for the quick response from the Secret Service, law enforcement, and emergency responders.
"We all need to heal. Let's stay calm, support each other, and work together to make our nation safer and kinder for all , political adversaries included.
"Political violence and hatred have no place in our society. It accomplishes nothing. We are a democracy. Outvote them, nothing more. Real, meaningful change starts with each of us."
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
Paid for by Friends of Dr. Bob

| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)

| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=146588036&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NTg4MDM2LCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5MTgwNTgsImV4cCI6MTcyMzUxMDA1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uOBs_fWA-rNOzo_dhhy3TXx4GemAJPekFu2pDcUyOYE)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/prayers-for-president-trump?utm_source=email&inbox=true)
---
Friends,
All of us at the State Freedom Caucus Network are praying for President Donald J. Trump and the attendees at today's rally who were caught in the line of fire. Today's attempted assassination of the Republican nominee for President will truly go down as one of the darkest days in the history of our county.
Keep fighting,
**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

name: NHGOP Headquarters
subject: GOD BLESS AMERICA AND GOD BLESS PRESIDENT TRUMP
body:
| | | | |
---
| God Bless President Trump and the United States of America. I ask all of you to pray for President Trump, the attendees that have been killed or injured, and our country. This shooting is nothing less than evil. Let’s pull together and fight for our views - without violence. But make no mistake, we will protect ourselves.
---
| Chris Ager, Chairman

subject: RPVI Comments On Attempted Trump Assasination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:

| “The assassination attempt on President Trump is unacceptable. People need to learn to disagree peacefully rather than turn to violence to attempt to defeat their opponents.
President Trump’s response showcased the strength and determination our country desperately needs right now. Our delegates from the Republican Party of the Virgin Islands are on the ground in Milwaukee, eagerly preparing to support his nomination in just a few days.”
John YobChairmanRepublican Party in the Virgin Islands

name: Matt Diemer
subject: Violence is never the answer
body:
| |
---
Peter, I am disgusted by the attempted assassination on President Trump. I'm hoping President Trump makes a full recovery and gets back on the campaign trail soon. Assassination attempts have no place in a democracy. It's being reported that an innocent rally attendee was killed. An innocent person's life was cut short.
Let me be clear: **violence is never the answer.** We need to settle our differences at the ballot box and with words. No matter your view of President Trump, we should all condemn this senseless violence. This is an incredibly sad day for America, and I hope it never happens again.
---
Sincerely, Matt Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7
---
|
---
Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 40042

clean_body: | | Peter, I am disgusted by the attempted assassination on President Trump. I'm hoping President Trump makes a full recovery and gets back on the campaign trail soon. Assassination attempts have no place in a democracy. It's being reported that an innocent rally attendee was killed. An innocent person's life was cut short. Let me be clear: violence is never the answer. We need to settle our differences at the ballot box and with words. No matter your view of President Trump, we should all condemn this senseless violence. This is an incredibly sad day for America, and I hope it never happens again. Sincerely, Matt Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7 | Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 40042 Bay Village, Ohio 44140 | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Matthew Diemer, please .

subject: We need to change course

This doesn't make any sense, Peter:

**A group of generous donors is matching every donation supporters make to my campaign until our mid-month deadline, but somehow we're still short of our mid-month fundraising goal.**

With Republicans naming me as a top target and experts rating my Senate race a toss-up, I really need your support to fight back against my self-funding opponent and the waves of outside spending crashing into Montana.

This slowdown could not have come at a worse time. While outside special interest groups ramp up their spending with $4,000,000 in new spending, our fundraising is slowing to a crawl.

I’m not here to beg for a donation, but falling short has real consequences. If everyone who received this email chipped in $5, we could close the gap _tonight_ , but the truth is not everyone will.

[So I’m humbly reaching out to ask you, Peter, to split a donation between my campaign and Democracy on the Line before the mid-month deadline and help reach these crucial targets. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: This is a message from Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC Inc
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
\- July 13th, 2024 -
I want to thank The United States Secret Service, and all of Law Enforcement, for their rapid response on the shooting that just took place in Butler, Pennsylvania.
Most importantly, I want to extend my condolences to the family of the person at the Rally who was killed, and also to the family of another person that was badly injured.
It is incredible that such an act can take place in our Country. Nothing is known at this time about the shooter, who is now dead.
I was shot with a bullet that pierced the upper part of my right ear.
I knew immediately that something was wrong in that I heard a whizzing sound, shots, and immediately felt the bullet ripping through the skin.
Much bleeding took place, so I realized then what was happening.
GOD BLESS AMERICA!

Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States

The Attempted Assassination Attempt on former President Trump was a deplorable act. While the details are still coming in, there was a rapid response by the US Secret Service and others in law enforcement.
I made this video as I learned of the tragic event just minutes after it happened.
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dcd580a8-fe2f-45ec-993b-b4378f4c96cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Pledge your support](https://substack..39jH5WG2H42AXsGShFcXbQy_XEY_Wt4ArAX70b96jdc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=146589067)
There is at least one rally attendee that was killed and my condolences go out to that person's family and there was at least one other attendee that was badly injured. The fact that this can happen in America, especially to a well-defended former President and candidate is deplorable. This causes fear for future rally attendees and other public gatherings and fear is a deterrent to our democracy. It is unacceptable.
With respect to President Trump, he was shot in the upper part of his ear. He was immediately protected by his secret service detail. He arose from the shooting and put his fist in the air symbolizing his resolve.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/800e8105-24c7-49de-93a0-c62168f4e268?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(Source AP)
_**We live in a democracy, and disagreements are settled at the ballot box.**_ It is not clear how many were involved and the investigation is unfolding. We have to let the investigation take its course but in a rapid manner to ensure that this was an isolated incident. Justice must prevail and all of those involved must be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law. We cannot let this tragedy instill fear in Americans.
**Democracy must prevail and this is another example where violence has taken over our nation. These political disagreements and polarization must be addressed at the ballot box and in meaningful dialogue.**
I still believe in this great country and I am grateful that President Trump, as the current candidate for the presidency will live to fight another day. He yelled "Fight, Fight, Fight" after he stood up.
In tragedy, you learn who your real friends are. Even with the time zone, Benjamin Netanyahu, Prime Minister of Israel, appears to be the first to respond.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c556d264-3bba-4b63-b61c-e80d5cdc8f59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(Source [x.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/38a6985d-535e-4792-8fdc-6e01974a955e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
He beat President Biden to the response by an hour
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c1155aae-d353-4ced-84ed-0f2dfbcae618?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(Source [X.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2a8934e7-b76f-462c-9199-35740d94c62d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
As Americans, our resolve must be stronger now than ever. There are forces at play that threaten our way of life. This is not about our political parties. It is about our democracy. It is sad that tragedies usually bring out the best in America to join together and fight a common enemy.
**This is why it is more important to make your voices heard at the ballot box this November and this August at the Primary. There are no excuses.** This is your fight to save our democracy and our country and **the time is NOW**.
I am fighting to ensure that our democracy and way of life is protected and endures.
**MAKE YOUR VOICES HEARD ON AUGUST 13th BY GOING TO THE POLLS.**

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: they’re dedicated!
body:
What happens in November is going to determine the course of the Pro-Life Movement...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

The 2024 elections are heating up BIG TIME.

Even as I write to you, I’m scheduling the next round of door knocking for our pro-life student canvassers.

Frankly, we push our student volunteers to the max trying to knock on as many doors as possible in key targeted districts across the country – districts that could ultimately decide everything.

Our canvassers travel non-stop across states knocking on doors, engaging in conversations with voters, leading text messaging, phone banks, and media campaigns, and registering new pro-life voters . . .

They have bruised knuckles from knocking on doors, blisters from walking neighborhoods, and stories of being accosted by angry pro-abortion radicals they’ve run into.

But they do it all knowing that their efforts today through November will result in more wins for pro-life champions... and more precious lives being saved from the violence of abortion.

**[Pro-Life Friend, will you please prayerfully consider sending a PRO-LIFE CARE PACKAGE to one of our student canvassers to encourage them as the battle for Life heats up in 2024](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gjjbyk-duchtdja-y/)?**

The truth is, our team of pro-life canvassers are the backbone of our 2024 efforts.

In fact, _Students for Life Action_ has several door knocking deployments coming up in an effort to reach the most voters ahead of Election Day.

Our next deployments will take place in Wyoming and New Hampshire before the upcoming Republican Primaries.

Not only are these deployments critical to converting voters and driving pro-life turnout, but they’re also helping to shift the larger cultural battle – one we cannot ignore if we want to make abortion illegal and unthinkable.

With your support, _Students for Life Action’s_ efforts aided several key pro-life victories across the country during the Republican Primary season in 2024 . . . victories that are key for ensuring we build a pro-life farm team to keep the GOP pro-life, including in:

*****_Oklahoma_** – where TWO leading pro-abortion Senators _(one who was going to the be Senate leader!)_ were thrown out of office for killing our Chemical Abortion Pill Trafficking Bill. This was after our students sent out 26,078 text messages, made 26,931 phone calls, and knocked on 633 doors;

*****_South Carolina_** – where THREE pro-abortion Republican Senators were defeated at the polls after killing our _“Life at Conception Act.”_ All in all, we knocked on 2,572 doors, sent 129,241 text messages, and made 51,371 phone calls exposing these Senators’ radicalism; and

*****_North Carolina_** – where _Students for Life Action_ sent 52,554 text messages, made 25,761 phone calls, and knocked 1,052 doors. After exposing the pro-abortion candidates in the races, FOUR pro-life candidates won their primaries, which may be key to the GOP gaining ground in the legislature!!
As you’ll see, our students are making a tremendous impact.

It’s absolutely critical that we support our student volunteers the best we can.

These young men and women are on the front lines every day putting in late nights of driving or making calls, having doors slammed in their faces, and even being harassed and attacked by pro-abortion radicals.

**[So, your contribution of even $25 for a hot pizza that our canvassers can enjoy after a long day, would be greatly appreciated](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gjjbyk-duchtdja-j/).**

But what I’d really like to do is send them a whole care package to keep them going.

Something that says, _“Thanks for all your hard work, and God bless you!”_

A **[Care Package Gift of $100](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gjjbyk-duchtdja-t/)** can provide the door knocking materials they need, like _Students for Life Action_ shirts, flyers, postcards, markers, and more!

And a **[Care Package Gift of $50](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gjjbyk-duchtdja-i/)** can pay for a tank of gas for a student’s day of driving to and from strategic locations.

But, if you’d be willing to provide one student with all the materials, gas, and meals they’ll need while they volunteer for us – _a whole care package_ – **[a generous Care Package Gift of $250](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gjjbyk-duchtdja-d/)** would accomplish that.

It’s clear that _Planned Parenthood_ and their Abortion Lobby pals thinks they already have 2024 in the bag.

And they certainly don’t hide the fact that it’s the tainted millions they make from their bloody “business” that makes them so certain – _not to mention the $700+ million in taxpayer funding they rake in every year._

But it’s you and countless other pro-lifers – _like our dedicated student canvassers_ – who, through their time, talent, and treasure, help _Students for Life Action_ continue to exceed the Abortion Lobby in support!

Just look at what we did with _Roe v. Wade!_

And we couldn’t have done it without the decades of hard work from our volunteers – all of whom are supported by the generosity of good folks like you.

**[So, please consider making your most generous Care Package Gift of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to _Students for Life Action_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gjjbyk-duchtdja-h/).**

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you are no longer interested you can [unsubscribe instantly](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-gjjbyk-duchtdja-l/).

name: Jesse Mullen
subject: We will not succumb to fear and violence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State
body:
| | | [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=0e3ba3649b574229a053d5d12edc2111&_e=vnMORre6yrbjx4cmHFfQcAW73ghZdqotz6Y1IKIkW9Srl0d8VltCLEKFoFEyFC6OD8V_c1oIZ0Qo29A1rdlNWYEXqIVy3JDnnBHUbZ9I-9AUXYW8bU-v1wbnE5oVL7NidRxY98yE1yH2WQ6kk_4SRAL5wAz0BzHinIPUASAK84l6N90V5ad_8pUkdLgFieZmnw_LlQQt_sbVsty3sO7zLpMoHKO953ArnP3ssEMQ9FsTZav6zaWh8PsVQdnFpgvHwg96-ZrVnByGAS9omjKlYEImg6glfM_sH3oFQSDIziLI6EN6O5sZ5qH1zGhOAgUdw_4XYUGrOLl8rYQ3ci7HtIOsKf2vqrPv18iJyP4JwPHXhRHn-dsww0tJKT3GW_VJGUXEmS5sNppH8WhOpYFYbw%3D%3D) Friend, Now that we know former President Trump is safe and was not seriously injured, I must express my gratitude to the members of the Secret Service who carried out their duty in protecting the former President. Political violence has no place in this country. Violence begets confusion, more violence, and attacks on our uniquely American freedoms. Today, I fear for our state and nation. We will not succumb to fear. We will not succumb to violence. And we will remain united. Thank you. Jesse James Mullen Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State
---

Jesse Mullen , PO Box 811 Deer Lodge, MT 59722

subject: Special Report: 7/13/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**July 13, 2024** **SPECIAL REPORT** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Rocky Mountain Voice Readers,
My fellow Coloradans, I ask you to join me in prayer for President Trump and America. Many of us watched on live TV today as an assassin attempted to take Donald J. Trump’s life. #PRAYFORTRUMP
In prayer, Heidi Ganahl
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
| | **ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
---
**[President Trump rushed away following gunfire at Butler, Penn., rally assassination attempt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 13** _The sound of multiple gunshots rang out Saturday at former President Donald Trump’s rally in Butler, Pa., split seconds before he seemed to reach for his right ear and went to the ground behind the podium from which Mr. Trump was speaking._
**[President Trump: ‘I was shot ... I heard a whizzing sound, shots and immediately felt the bullet’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 13** _The sound of multiple gunshots rang out Saturday at former President Donald Trump’s rally in Butler, Pa., split seconds before he seemed to reach for his right ear and went to the ground behind the podium from which Mr. Trump was speaking._
**[Rep. Boebert: ‘Praying for President Trump’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 13** _Moments into former President Donald J. Trump’s campaign rally in Butler, Penn., Saturday, Mr. Trump was apparently struck by gunfire._
_**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[‘Cowardly attack’: Former presidents condemn shooting at Trump rally](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE HILL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Former Presidents Bill Clinton, George W. Bush and Barack Obama joined members of both parties in condemning the shooting at President Trump’s rally in Pennsylvania on Saturday, which injured Trump and killed one attendee._
**[Trump campaign: Republican convention will go on in aftermath of assassination attempt, deadly shooting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE WASHINGTON TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Former President Donald Trump’s campaign says the Republican National Convention will go on as scheduled following an assassination attempt on him Saturday._ _**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Democrats fell to their knees after receiving this devastating news from a key 2024 swing state
body:
DAILY NEWS | July 14, 2024

Democrats fell to
their knees after receiving this devastating news from a key 2024
swing state

The 2024 elections will make or break the radical Left
this November. But their hopes to win them are looking very grim
at the moment.

And Democrats fell to their knees
after receiving this devastating news from a key 2024 swing
state.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Top doctor exposes Biden's
free-falling health in this bombshell video

Democrats are
panicking. They only have weeks to figure out what they're going
to do.
➞ Continue Reading

Another major swing state
slaps Democrats with a cataclysmic election surprise

Back in 2020,
election laws helped Democrats. Now the script has been flipped.

➞ Continue Reading

Biden campaign insider
leaks major announcement we've all been waiting for

No one can doubt that
Biden will not be president by January of next year. The question
now is whether he'll even continue trying.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Diane Sare
subject: A Near Miss for Our Republic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240713_trump_assassination&n=1)
---
Friend --[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=cWgbLvmFQ2PvtnKwJ1wKJFNfG2kVZR8s4k4Ca-cPxoipJS4DFl8r95P-L11CoXZO&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240713_trump_assassination&n=2) We all should be profoundly thankful that former President Trump was not more seriously injured in the contemptible attempt on his life at his Pennsylvania campaign rally, both for his own health and safety, and for what might be occurring right now in the streets of our nation, had he been seriously wounded, or worse. We mourn the loss of life of a participant at what was to have been an energizing rally, intended to bring Americans into the electoral process. As a candidate for U.S. Senate, and a human being, I condemn this assassination attempt, and will be demanding answers as to how it occurred. Our nation is based on a constitutional presidential system, so threatening or doing harm to a president or a candidate for that high office constitutes a serious threat to our republic. I would encourage everyone to think very deeply about what just occurred. We cannot allow this to happen again. On July 1, I warned of a possible threat to the life of the former president. (See [ _The New Federalist_ ](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=KJvmT2HcT3DkpvUHL2Xm9lGXRcq-j87eSlDqCUMPd7T4mPskePjSNfPKY95a4nwm5CTWVyguUyOXpIP7aWZPpQ8O3U11pjDEqG2NVZ5tVOfVwYfnrVbtVCP1HpIbSmozE2Liw2GeC7CW3aQVEmFHV9sur96HVQ9K3rU9ryzi24403__nnwTwl7kxxvgta0oN&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240713_trump_assassination&n=3)on page 2.) I warned of this in the context of the failed assassination attempt against Slovakian President Robert Fico, who miraculously survived after being hit by several bullets on May 15. Like President Fico, former President Donald Trump is committed to bringing an end to the Russia/Ukraine conflict. Participants at the recent NATO summit, held in Washington, D.C., adopted measures which will only intensify the war, putting the world in great danger. However, NATO is not unified. Slovakian President Fico bravely spoke by video against allowing Ukraine to ever join NATO, and Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, who has been meeting with world leaders in an attempt to bring a negotiated end to the war, also visited President Trump while he was here. Meanwhile, it is obvious to everyone that President Joe Biden cannot possibly be running our government, and we want to know, _who is_? Most of our representatives, including Sen. Gillibrand, my opponent, have been doing nothing but continuing to fund the murderous war machine which endangers us all. Will they demand emergency measures to protect all of our presidential candidates, including President Biden, former President Trump, and Robert Kennedy, Jr.? There is much more on my mind as we enter a new period of extreme turbulence, but I think it is prudent to wait until more is known. Since we are still in the month of July, I recommend sitting down to re-read the Declaration of Independence and our Constitution, and resolve that government "of the People, by the People, and for the People shall not perish from the earth."
* * *
| [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240713_trump_assassination&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240713_trump_assassination&n=4)
---
\--Diane
* * *

clean_body: | | Friend -- We all should be profoundly thankful that former President Trump was not more seriously injured in the contemptible attempt on his life at his Pennsylvania campaign rally, both for his own health and safety, and for what might be occurring right now in the streets of our nation, had he been seriously wounded, or worse. We mourn the loss of life of a participant at what was to have been an energizing rally, intended to bring Americans into the electoral process. As a candidate for U.S. Senate, and a human being, I condemn this assassination attempt, and will be demanding answers as to how it occurred. Our nation is based on a constitutional presidential system, so threatening or doing harm to a president or a candidate for that high office constitutes a serious threat to our republic. I would encourage everyone to think very deeply about what just occurred. We cannot allow this to happen again. On July 1, I warned of a possible threat to the life of the former president. (See page 2.) I warned of this in the context of the failed assassination attempt against Slovakian President Robert Fico, who miraculously survived after being hit by several bullets on May 15. Like President Fico, former President Donald Trump is committed to bringing an end to the Russia/Ukraine conflict. Participants at the recent NATO summit, held in Washington, D.C., adopted measures which will only intensify the war, putting the world in great danger. However, NATO is not unified. Slovakian President Fico bravely spoke by video against allowing Ukraine to ever join NATO, and Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, who has been meeting with world leaders in an attempt to bring a negotiated end to the war, also visited President Trump while he was here. Meanwhile, it is obvious to everyone that President Joe Biden cannot possibly be running our government, and we want to know, who is? Most of our representatives, including Sen. Gillibrand, my opponent, have been doing nothing but continuing to fund the murderous war machine which endangers us all. Will they demand emergency measures to protect all of our presidential candidates, including President Biden, former President Trump, and Robert Kennedy, Jr.? There is much more on my mind as we enter a new period of extreme turbulence, but I think it is prudent to wait until more is known. Since we are still in the month of July, I recommend sitting down to re-read the Declaration of Independence and our Constitution, and resolve that government "of the People, by the People, and for the People shall not perish from the earth." | "DONATE" \--Diane | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Sare for Senate

name: Your America News
subject: Is Capitalism More Humane Than Socialism? Get the Free eBook
body:
This work explores the deep-seated debates around free-market capitalism and its alternatives

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4gtg7am5tnedkaip5goiph9l7osnorvrrgm7588_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjgmepr4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, I'm excited to share an insightful eBook from the Hoover Institution, "Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism." This work explores the deep-seated debates around free-market capitalism and its alternatives, and you can [get your free copy at this link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgd0e5borbakql4tu2u5sl1eteeb51ajnq87k0m0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjgmepr4cph2bs)

In the eBook, Russell Roberts challenges the common view that capitalism is based on greed and results in inequality. He argues that free-market competition leads to innovation and better outcomes for consumers and workers.

Ayaan Hirsi Ali, drawing from her experiences growing up in socialist Somalia, illustrates how capitalism can enhance personal freedom and improve living standards. Her powerful narrative shows how economic systems shape individual lives.

This eBook is part of the Human Prosperity Project, which offers scholarly analyses of various economic systems and their impacts on prosperity and well-being.

This eBook provides a balanced perspective on why capitalism might be the more humane and effective choice in a time of growing traction for socialist ideas.

[Click here to request your free copy of "Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism."](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr64kfgc315fvgcpho16hf7h5q92vflgth19iq3g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjgmepr4cph2bs)

Best regards,
Greg Stamps

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---|---
| | _With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:

---

And while they may LOVE AMERICA and believe in AMERICAN GREATNESS, they don't always understand what's been lost!_[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zupl5gtuv3766vj1o504hh9h76v46pu63i1dtadg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjgm9ob2cph2bs)_

* The POWERFUL CASE for _really_ learning the history of America and Western civilization, with a recommended reading list that starts with Homer and continues to the 21st century (pages 235-237), to

* The power of taking action THIS INSTANT ... and how one little action in the right direction every day will totally change their lives and our country's future for the better (page 289).

---
I truly believe that _Right Wing Revolution_ is one of the MOST IMPORTANT projects I have ever worked on in our shared mission to BEAT the "Woke" Left and WIN the American Culture War. Put simply: I wrote this book to try and improve America, to strengthen our pro-America movement and our shared American culture, and to inspire MILLIONS MORE conservatives to join me in the fight to SAVE AMERICA ... and WIN. _And that 's why I want to get it in the hands of as many grassroots patriots and young patriotic students as possible!_ _[**Please don 't wait to claim your FREE copy of ****_Right Wing Revolution_****with your gift of ANY amount right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemhlllbe1rbkboupkomdp7a81ikfhpsjf5ia440_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjgm9ob2cph2bs)_ Thank you for your continued support. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Your American News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zth9ckbatnch308dlmvi1c4ra8uq7nqmre2202h0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim8oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z96s2geotkjs8b21s9htsq7iusu6bbgc0svv88e0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim8oj2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z36ef3ktuhqaifet03rqp8l0qp9f8cf4icepc8mg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim8oj2c5h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

name: Update for America
subject: The Moral Case for Capitalism: Download Your Free eBook
body:
This work explores the deep-seated debates around free-market capitalism and its alternatives

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7i89k2cjf34526v3g04i65her60jh589dq86duo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjimco32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, I'm excited to share an insightful eBook from the Hoover Institution, "Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism." This work explores the deep-seated debates around free-market capitalism and its alternatives, and you can [get your free copy at this link.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvve1pnpt2mjdnob41bfi9up8mhjegag2kvafelg_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjimco32cth2bs)

In the eBook, Russell Roberts challenges the common view that capitalism is based on greed and results in inequality. He argues that free-market competition leads to innovation and better outcomes for consumers and workers.

Ayaan Hirsi Ali, drawing from her experiences growing up in socialist Somalia, illustrates how capitalism can enhance personal freedom and improve living standards. Her powerful narrative shows how economic systems shape individual lives.

This eBook is part of the Human Prosperity Project, which offers scholarly analyses of various economic systems and their impacts on prosperity and well-being.

This eBook provides a balanced perspective on why capitalism might be the more humane and effective choice in a time of growing traction for socialist ideas.

[Click here to request your free copy of "Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism."](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhi75n8hitgo1k98iui8e0831tdqq7kgd7qdcf68_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjimco32cth2bs)

Best regards,
Greg Stamps

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

The Deep State has been pulling the strings, and now it's about to get worse. Biden's days are numbered, and who's next in line? These liberal elites aren't just playing politics; they're **coming for YOUR savings!** They've got a **plan to take over your money and leave you with nothing.** Higher taxes, government control, and a digital dollar to track every penny you spend. This isn't about convenience; it's about CONTROL. Kamala, Michelle, Newsom – they'll **CRUSH your IRA and 401(k).** Biden's already set the stage with massive tax hikes:
* Income taxes

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv3ddbe9lhl4pjhahqvf66vj0n3ge07ejbrmtf1g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim6or4c3h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3bqc6gkvdudtufpa0fos827gsuiba1ehtk40p0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim6or4c3h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmmpt1q2bfug8a9btui7hc5pp06na4cmgungc61g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim6or4c3h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlqfijdtffr787f330vi3net277taba9naquu8i8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim6or4c3h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkgf0ah3qd74pvnql05pcijumc0q29gi4jpnla6g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim6or4c3h2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr5mkfdg8mgfp35e9tuvnjt71o7egaqq6t9h9vs0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjim6or4c3h2bs "Get Started")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|

This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...

* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

subject: Gavin Newsom makes final presidential election decision that left Democrats' jaws on the floor
body:
DAILY NEWS | July 14, 2024

Gavin Newsom makes
final presidential election decision that left Democrats' jaws on
the floor

The radical Leftist governor is a popular pick to replace
Biden in the 2024 election. His decision to run would send
shockwaves throughout the country.

And Gavin Newsom has made his
final presidential election decision that's left Democrats' jaws
on the floor.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Democrats fell to their
knees after receiving this devastating news from a key 2024 swing
state

The 2024 elections
will make or break the radical Left this November. But their
hopes to win them are looking very grim at the moment.
➞ Continue Reading

Top doctor exposes Biden's
free-falling health in this bombshell video

Democrats are
panicking. They only have weeks to figure out what they're going
to do.
➞ Continue Reading

Another major swing state
slaps Democrats with a cataclysmic election surprise

Back in 2020,
election laws helped Democrats. Now the script has been flipped.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

personal information we may collect about you, including across

subject: If you're over age 40 and eat ALMONDS or PISTACHIOS - read this
body:
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.

We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
"It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
"Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help."
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called " health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline. " This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body." Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems. Dr. Gundry explains, "These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal." The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home. "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. body:
We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.

We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
"It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
"Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help."
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.
Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.
Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Flyover
subject: President Trump Shot at a Rally, Would-be Assassin Killed, and Unanswered Questions
body:
President Donald Trump was speaking at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania when a would-be assassin fired a rifle from a nearby rooftop, [striking Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfAxsRXDAkA8O3sOVbO1rYPsxVYCz7mij_vmrnzu_wSs_HY3wkqrSt_1PDwLmPaWZ64uiVsQrsaOUSMiLgVWIwHvTdWetAlnAHyAlzRnT5ludpMODS4GGZrn6Z_CIpgAarvbFGawNwyZPzt8HpmzbotbkLq3Eh7sfls9PGBXN99ycel7k3WUNh3k9x_ScgCohcsFCtP01ALL3hhq9TQJxT2xOtm4BovdfODYqpYaUNVc-Kj6-2qyPV-lZn6Z1pWwXEVolRQJRHWPYX1Uqn88LqtSX6nUj-m-MZ4DsAAP__UWJifw) in the right ear.

# SUNDAY, JULY 14, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**. On this date in 1789, hundreds of Parisians stormed the Bastille fortress in one of the decisive moments of the French Revolution. Bastille Day is still celebrated as a holiday in France and many French restaurants. ([See Image](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GO6yAQRb8Gd7aYAQMpKF7jLq_d0iJmsGeFQ4RRrPz9yltveXWPdHS-7vM9cObn-j_s5Fsqc1gav2m2Pege9ay76BMRkurIg0V5M1ob7DZ_i5iCSsaBss4uehxjdGCcW4IhDdCxR4laWtAgJSAO6WGsG410EshKuAktKXIrdfgu_Gwbpfwpb6rDUvYu-6211yHUP4GTwOk8z-EsNceNj1bqZyh1FTjxHlYSOMFolRI4tY3669_5ufYl9dd-hKNxzhfWVR9fJ-fMh7FCy3UPnH997e_6t8efAAAA___iRVtS)) Yesterday was a solemn day in American history, and we're thankful that it wasn't worse--as it easily could have been. Our lead story today is, of course, the attempted assassination of President Trump, and we expect to include follow-up stories throughout the week.
Today's edition is sponsored by [Empire Today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz8FK7DAUgOGnSXZTktNM0llkcbkQROkgjqC7kqYn7dG0GdrQ4tuLrn2An5_vre1aT4mW8epntCXmzodCO3bmJNUJVKf4YCMiYM3RSgPiopXSwCd7Dro5ox90gD6EoLCJdRx6o0yD4qJrThYEKGGkkkJIgCr22jRnLRoh0Qh5YUrgQCWv1UempUwY01feca1CnnmyUyn3jdX_GDgG7jiOasMQ8pRn3HDdKeA2-_UTCy3jT8LAvT4_tfrx-sDAvTt5e4H_NwaOr3a4H5QSbdowJcbZU_qdlL_Ju4XvAAAA___G5Vf2), with special deals for Flyover readers on top quality flooring.

## President Trump Shot at Rally
President Donald Trump was shot yesterday. He was speaking at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, when a would-be assassin fired a rifle from a nearby rooftop, [striking Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfAxsRXDAkA8O3sOVbO1rYPsxVYCz7mij_vmrnzu_wSs_HY3wkqrSt_1PDwLmPaWZ64uiVsQrsaOUSMiLgVWIwHvTdWetAlnAHyAlzRnT5ludpMODS4GGZrn6Z_CIpgAarvbFGawNwyZPzt8HpmzbotbkLq3Eh7sfls9PGBXN99ycel7k3WUNh3k9x_ScgCohcsFCtP01ALL3hhq9TQJxT2xOtm4BovdfODYqpYaUNVc-Kj6-2qyPV-lZn6Z1pWwXEVolRQJRHWPYX1Uqn88LqtSX6nUj-m-MZ4DsAAP__UWJifw) in the right ear. See unedited video of the moment [here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8Gtljc-czhgaELW7p2tEh8xFQ4RDZ107-v0rnre9KT3sd5Osdc8v32HlfxLdUpXls-ZOIT0AlpIj37JILSa_HAaEZLZFEv_iJCkRImlDEyzTxAHCQSkWNJqdfZo0EyDATGAGKXLpbdYI0zIGxgVGRkzq1u3WfN97ZIKj_1kK271lUXv7T22FX_pjAoDM8XVRhieSoMe4vta1cYwAH2NA6ADGhdPzhWGI48S31Zvfn58Z1LybtlRea2xlz--u3_28PjbwAAAP__xqZSuA). (Warning, disturbing footage). "_I was shot with a bullet that pierced the upper part of my right ear," _[Trump later said](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFr8zAQQH-NtCXcnS8ne9DwwYe3dCp0NIp1jlXkyNiKS_99Seeu78GD93EdriHl9Li_hUV9ncoQxpoOHdwJ-UQ8sI1-UiVtrHp0BJ0wC9nZC1Jzm0IbhSSMLF1s4kjKErqLYAs2eQJicMgIgETn6SauvQi0gOoAO8OgMdWynT9LetRZp_xdDt3OY1ls9nOt626af4Z6Q33dnnXey5hCfvkXZNg05P_lEXJ8357Laqhfy153Qz0iuZZABPjSEBI7u_m4fqWc0y7OMNyXkH5Ttv49fnj6CQAA__-dJ1dJ) in a statement. "_I knew immediately that something was wrong in that I heard a whizzing sound, shots, and immediately felt the bullet ripping through the skin_." The Secret Service quickly closed in to protect President Trump, and a sniper team returned fire and killed Thomas Matthew Crooks, the 20-year-old man [identified by the FBI](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGnwR3WMCaQFBS3cZfbbmkRM8SzwmBh1lbefpWtttjuSF9xpP_jPt09J87P_34l12KZ_Nz4oMlKpSXqSXfBRSKkoSOnLMLNaG2wW5xXQcM8RAve-wBxsGS8sfpytRHVI3bsEFCDVVoBKMQ-Poy9XgxcQZEFdRMaKHArtf8snNtCMb3KQbWfy9olt7S27WL4J3AUOJ7n2efHnOnc3y5w3ErixvP-a8o3Cxxb_Vo3WX1KL7kvpTSqkgPlxpEpyDpnr4yyF9tVF7aTU-LdWKHhuXpOP__t7xqHw-8AAAD___w5YvA) as the shooter. As the Secret Service began rushing Trump toward the motorcade, the President pumped his fist repeatedly and shouted, "Fight! Fight! Fight!" A man who witnessed Crooks crawling with a rifle on a rooftop [said he alerted police](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFvwjAUBn-NvYHe-_Ic24OHUikbrB2jADZxZRKUuKH99xWdu95wp_s49schlzzdTsM9hprmfrjUvMXe7lh2kF70NaQYERsdA1uQb0Va6DEYgUmNTYmT8ebsLbtGnBPygG8c6RxAELIsTMTAPp1b60xLjjhaYq-E4jXXedl_znmqY0zlZ97isr_Md13CWOtjVc2bQqfQfb-oQnc4vJ_ic53ybawK3VqH-rUqdOwYcGIsIAy8inoJ18czl5LX1iqh233I5U9e_1_dAn4DAAD__6Z-UIQ), but the response was too slow to stop the shooting. [Questions are swirling](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQgOGnwR0WjIlxCopr3OWa6HSlhWGwJ8IQAXGUt1_t1lv_za_v_225WYqUtr_2QNNCXqxrdOKiuVQc1KI6bwIi4NChkRrEdVRqhG43Plwmjyusw6RQhUEK6wen16AnKx1CRwYEKKGlkkJIgD6so54uo5iERC3klSmBnlou_SNTajuG-Mknlt7lo4tmb-1Z2fCHwcxgtqtL-K79lr8zg_nfncH8poL3lsuHwVzRFWy8YjnJIad0Ym202UZp49srHTbxuufGKT1eBT1v5XU8uYu5IpdSXmFQw9gV459vipHqqJkS22Ep_hy1331OA18BAAD__24LaSc) about how a shooter was able to access the rooftop without being engaged, and House Speaker Mike Johnson has promised a [full investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFutDAQBOCnMZ2Rd8_YXOHib-jub1MiYxbYyJxPtgO5t49InW6kkb6R5uMxPjxHfq7__U6uLmn0ofJBo5WgJepRN7NbiJBuDTmwqO5Ga4PN5gix6ycEA4DoO4SerPWkgpkmnLvQsEOFWlnQoBQgtstkbN8Z1Ssgq-AutKKZa8rtZ-Jn3WiJ73RQbkPam-i2Wl9F3P4JHAQO53m2_ptTuVqBw2ULHJQVOMCVav7aXzL7GN-ybClVfq7y4gqvW5Uh7ZRloZCpykL54EBNdvPr5Bi5GCu0WnfP8Xe9_v3F4fAnAAD__7D0YDg). A photographer captured [an incredible photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzGTsyAQgOFfAx3Osq6ABcXX2OVrr3SIrpEMgqMkTv79zV199Vu883zdxluIKebH_7Cxr0sZw1Tjm0erNCmkkeTsF2bkVrLXFqE3RAbl6pfAxgbX2Un37PTdtsG5qSVDHdDd9DJ6BCSwmjSARmyWu7GuM-BAswXdCwKeYy1H8ywx15WX9ClvPpqpbDL5tdb9FO0_gYPA4bqu5hPWUn6qwCHzdQocyh5zLFnV47Xt6vk6q5oODpVnVTIrbKmjzgE0a92SPPy8XzGleBorCB5biOn3Vv-2vz1-BwAA__81M1qF) of the President holding his fist aloft as the Secret Service tried to hurry him along, with blood streaking down his face and an American flag in the background. A male audience member was killed in the attack, as described by a doctor who attempted to save his life. [(Video: graphic warning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtkTc-Qx4YOjClq4dLTDnmAqbyKZO-_dVOnd9b3h6H7fxFnLJ2_09rOzaXMcwtXzyaC5AF6SRZHIzM3In2YFBNWgijXJxMKcYI4VBW90jDENME_c9K7KhSzHI7FAhKQMESgHidY7a2F4rq4CNgkGQ4pRb3a-fNW9t4bn81JP361RXWdzS2uMQ3ZtAL9B_v6hA_xwb7ztvEwv0Rwvt6xDowQJ2QICke21BA2mB_syJ68vK3aXHM5eSD20EqfsacvnLtP-nT4e_AQAA__9T9FWK)). President Trump [was seen](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvhSAURn8Nbhi4XgEHhi5ur2tHw9OL0iAYpZL---a9udv35QwnOV-P6eFCDGn9dDvZ4vPk5hJumjSXyAEnbBbriYC6hqzUIAaFqKDZrBTPpXfzoDpSvpODN8p7nI1ynfY9zk2wIACFliiFkACtfypteiWMkKSFHBgKWkLJZ_udQyob-fibbzrbOe9NtFspx8W6DwYjg7HW2qbnnKheL85gTLkyGO-wUH49qvy9-bXlevFy_uwHX6mUkFaevedHdIk4SDTSGNMbI5rTLkcNMYZLaYZi3V2Ib3v5v8Vt4S8AAP__kEVgSQ) walking off his plane in New Jersey last night. He's still expected to appear at the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee next week.
## Israeli Airstrike Kills At Least 90
An Israeli airstrike in Gaza targeting Muhammad Deif, thought to be the mastermind behind the October 7th terror attacks in Israel, and his deputy, Rafa'a Salameh, [resulted in at least 90 deaths](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnwdtZcCYmHhi6eEvXjhY25_gaDBGQWOnTV-nc9fuWn_5fl-niOHC8frqdbF3T5JbKT5oMKA2oJ914uxIhdQ1ZZVAOvdY9NpvtT0bK4TQM1M2LNrN358Us_YyEfsAOG7YoUUujtJJSIbbr3JvzqZdnqchINQgtyXNNuf1OHOtGa3ilJ-V2SXsT7FbrvYjuQ-AocDyOo830qJTL-38vKQcvcNzZ-0BArlSBo08_FAvcXaBSObKLBW4cAnlIGY70iJ48cMmOAoOr1S03uG0uwis9IhfY3O4KFPcq8PaDNKA6gWOTrb8fHAKX3ggtr7vj8Eet_4d7WvwNAAD__5s5cRc) Saturday. The strike allegedly hit a [designated, Hamas-controlled humanitarian zone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtSwzAQAL_G7uQ5XRQ_ChU06UJL6blIZ-dAljKSsIGvZ0JNu9vs7Nt1vpIEiesrbWzrkmZyVXaeB6WNQjOb1tuFGfnUstUDwtQb02N7t9OZ-uXmAW8wTsieep5AnxyQ83okasUioIFBGw2gEbvl1g_juYcRNA-gp8YAe6kpd-9JYr3zEr7TzrlzaWuDvdf6KM3ppcFLg5fjOLolfUU-ytM_ScrBN3iRkomDcikukreiSs3ywcql7ZE-o1dOdglCUVFmUiv9kKqUV64SV5VcVYPaqFTOm0TfZusfh4QgpR8aA-tGEv6C6v97dou_AQAA__9vcmqa) where the two targeted leaders were thought to be hiding. Prime Minister Netanyahu said in a statement that [it is uncertain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGunDAQheGnMd0gM3gxFC7S0G3alGiAAZwMeAWzIN4-2nvb2386Ovr_PLsnRYnb_JtWDjqljgaNJ3ceCgfoOpeNYWJGLjMOhUfbVM5VmC2hKQkf3tb-0Q-Nr7Ea2Ffo0Fp21Jc2iwEtOusLV1hbIOZTX_n6UdnaFuxt0RhneYya9vxvipsuPMmdTt7zIa2ZhEX1dZjyl8HWYHtdV65x5SNN8diJ5aMMthJP7iXNHW-63wbbjZW2m5Y3bEmB-iPJW1luGHhXihvoQgojxwn-RREeoX8rfG_CFUVgZgVNQCKw0EoHCNPI-2GwzfYwvj4oHpU3zs4rxa8nmf5c7wz4PwAA__8obHTL) whether the attack killed the two men, but he promised that "one way or another," Israel will eliminate all Hamas leadership.
## Subscription Websites Accused of Deception
The Federal Trade Commission this week released a study accusing many subscription-based websites of using [manipulative design techniques](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu3CAQRb8Gd7OCMWv8CopIkbuXNqWFYVizscGC8a7899GmTn2le47O7-_526Ut5ccvt5PlWGbnOb1oNqA0oJ51F2wkQuo7ssqg_Bq0HrBbbTDDuIwYHfajjv19uYdFy9556Ud0BrtkUaKWRmklpUK8xWUw432Qo1RkpPoSWlJIXOrtWVLmleJ2lRfVmy97t9mV-Wii_yFwEjgx-dXXM_v1MwucPucCJ2kETkoKnCJ7aHyGC2LKoUFw9Q8cjplqbnA2CrBc4GB3z1ITX1AitHNpvqaDU8ngjqOBywHetLTE1D7kfnqc3pczM1XR_1RdteF4p21LbTBCy8fu0vbPmP_f72XxbwAAAP__jS5ydQ) called "dark patterns" to push customers into taking actions they wouldn't otherwise. These tactics, found in over [75% of websites and apps examined](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskT2PnDAQQH-N6cayjQ9DQRHptN2lTYkMHoMjfyB7OLT59dFGd13aN2-mePPrY_mwIYa8_7QJZ_JlsRuFT1wMSA1KL7pzs0dU2Hc4S6PENGg9qO6YR7X6fhhX70cxDr3thdmE6acVrfJGT12YlVBaGKmlEFIp7tfBjG-DGIVEI-TEtEAXqFT-u4RMB_r4LJ9Y-VZSF-eD6Gys_8HUg6nHfd8c827djvQSmHrYZP-UDGcNCcHZJ4QGNqbSCA6sCO0oJ9CBsGIjQFvjExza2OBG2MoVHfiQHfhaEtjzjAhraQjNpnblHWx2kEpFkFIIZd4mww9KkfWPi9KS0IUrsf7dXlQ44XasNaAPeedX43RcvDr-VUAyNbx2Wrnqhqx_x2RD_IJbyYSZXpcqhS3iN7fptGHP3zoooVRXZ3feIcbQBsO02F-Tf8Ho_-_7nNXfAAAA___bSZ-S), include making it difficult to cancel subscriptions, deliberately using confusing language in privacy policies, and hiding important consumer information. The release of the new report could signal that the FTC is planning to pay increased attention to this type of consumer fraud, which they described in terms like sneaking, obstruction, nagging, forced action and others.

**➤****The New York Yankees** got into a benches-clearing brawl with the Baltimore Orioles on Friday after Yankees closer Clay Holmes hit Heston Kjerstad in the head with a 97 MPH sinker. clean_body: President Donald Trump was speaking at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania when a would-be assassin fired a rifle from a nearby rooftop, in the right ear. | | | | | | SUNDAY, JULY 14, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning. On this date in 1789, hundreds of Parisians stormed the Bastille fortress in one of the decisive moments of the French Revolution. Bastille Day is still celebrated as a holiday in France and many French restaurants. () Yesterday was a solemn day in American history, and we're thankful that it wasn't worse--as it easily could have been. Our lead story today is, of course, the attempted assassination of President Trump, and we expect to include follow-up stories throughout the week. Today's edition is sponsored by , with special deals for Flyover readers on top quality flooring. | President Trump Shot at Rally President Donald Trump was shot yesterday. He was speaking at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, when a would-be assassin fired a rifle from a nearby rooftop, in the right ear. See unedited video of the moment . (Warning, disturbing footage). "I was shot with a bullet that pierced the upper part of my right ear," in a statement. "I knew immediately that something was wrong in that I heard a whizzing sound, shots, and immediately felt the bullet ripping through the skin." The Secret Service quickly closed in to protect President Trump, and a sniper team returned fire and killed Thomas Matthew Crooks, the 20-year-old man as the shooter. As the Secret Service began rushing Trump toward the motorcade, the President pumped his fist repeatedly and shouted, "Fight! Fight! Fight!" A man who witnessed Crooks crawling with a rifle on a rooftop , but the response was too slow to stop the shooting. about how a shooter was able to access the rooftop without being engaged, and House Speaker Mike Johnson has promised a . A photographer captured of the President holding his fist aloft as the Secret Service tried to hurry him along, with blood streaking down his face and an American flag in the background. A male audience member was killed in the attack, as described by a doctor who attempted to save his life. ). President Trump walking off his plane in New Jersey last night. He's still expected to appear at the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee next week. Israeli Airstrike Kills At Least 90 An Israeli airstrike in Gaza targeting Muhammad Deif, thought to be the mastermind behind the October 7th terror attacks in Israel, and his deputy, Rafa'a Salameh, Saturday. The strike allegedly hit a where the two targeted leaders were thought to be hiding. Prime Minister Netanyahu said in a statement that whether the attack killed the two men, but he promised that "one way or another," Israel will eliminate all Hamas leadership. Subscription Websites Accused of Deception The Federal Trade Commission this week released a study accusing many subscription-based websites of using called "dark patterns" to push customers into taking actions they wouldn't otherwise. These tactics, found in over , include making it difficult to cancel subscriptions, deliberately using confusing language in privacy policies, and hiding important consumer information. The release of the new report could signal that the FTC is planning to pay increased attention to this type of consumer fraud, which they described in terms like sneaking, obstruction, nagging, forced action and others. From quotes on inspirational posters to cinematic one-liners, if something is clever and concise, it can be considered "epigrammatic." While the modern usage of this word developed from French, its roots are found in the Latin word "epigramma" ("an inscription") and the Greek words "epigramma" ("an inscription on a tomb or public monument") and "epigraphen" ("to write on or inscribe"). ...

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=976bc417b4264cbdad5142d761412ab8&_e=zU3iulXuIrxWogIcMwpZNXmQ0_hDesRBXkMhyhY7NhbS2_8ZfSaNbI1MAmZMpYf2yGPFl4rvRFfHu91WG64CDk-V7Q8HdeAyokOIViJSECAYxs8mr1pYK6qK4lI1-ADJKO_R7PL9hBQQRbz6wWrtHM19KrQz6tlP1yyPYm_TGyeFo6jMn_wmKaVn_ewodtXeQK_20ttkFnCSqLov5uX7vBK8uQXpVhjdUiMWtuoTa960oA_jlbPDT6E_-0XDXPYJ0ND6_s_F8wtYSPJFqFeto_CEgYx7nygx0_w6J73BanFGcvCTstTSDMrXFxyUig5byjc4BkCpoUopF9JkD1ZGW7vhMIIUNWY1Q5Ol7vRrx_aj6ld0cVbYQD0oGBp1EzUsHP1Y0BG-7JBihDFJYTWp-g%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=976bc417b4264cbdad5142d761412ab8&_e=zU3iulXuIrxWogIcMwpZNXmQ0_hDesRBXkMhyhY7NhbS2_8ZfSaNbI1MAmZMpYf2yGPFl4rvRFfHu91WG64CDk-V7Q8HdeAyokOIViJSECAYxs8mr1pYK6qK4lI1-ADJKO_R7PL9hBQQRbz6wWrtHM19KrQz6tlP1yyPYm_TGyeFo6jMn_wmKaVn_ewodtXeQK_20ttkFnCSqLov5uX7vBK8uQXpVhjdUiMWtuoTa960oA_jlbPDT6E_-0XDXPYJ2yzjSqWbiqd1kZgToPrYJfGNWdtwViUHsEu_-opLGfx_cPHLqKQpGnf6a0NtPP6xG4751k3IjYSlJg2dL6NDOTQBCAsl1QqApnGrLpnjtsu31NPt0cCf3hezrjVuhZtYbTjfNak0MDJ5r3VdcCuqIQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=976bc417b4264cbdad5142d761412ab8&_e=zU3iulXuIrxWogIcMwpZNXmQ0_hDesRBXkMhyhY7NhbS2_8ZfSaNbI1MAmZMpYf2yGPFl4rvRFfHu91WG64CDk-V7Q8HdeAyokOIViJSECAYxs8mr1pYK6qK4lI1-ADJKO_R7PL9hBQQRbz6wWrtHM19KrQz6tlP1yyPYm_TGyeFo6jMn_wmKaVn_ewodtXeQK_20ttkFnCSqLov5uX7vBK8uQXpVhjdUiMWtuoTa960oA_jlbPDT6E_-0XDXPYJmnbZ_KeyKronduup8Fstb6hZ2L3zNv-Hbq8pfvRT3SnH87ZmmhVjwf49qLH_sFX7CyoMHa04LY1aJRiSYJehCIjI7P2ym8Zt-RItT0SiCw67Dagrodg9VcFCDEANixb3KW3FZoZc3JAiM_9yYo3N_A%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | Dear Friend, [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VMU8xTsjrpNwBV_6SKDWUQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRodkkUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDcxNCZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZpIrsJNmIBNZLVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VMU8xTsjrpNwBV_6SKDWUQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRodkkUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDcxNCZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZpIrsJNmIBNZLVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VMU8xTsjrpNwBV_6SKDWUQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRodkkUP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDcxNCZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZpIrsJNmIBNZLVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes. This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day. Claim your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now through this secure link: ~ Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history! Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Discover What They Don’t Want You to Know: The Great Reset
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=928593fc78dd4f9cab2908cd055a579e&_e=4qt3-Ta6ey6oP1d-sE0sdljOhmc_VKQLTlYkWgMam9s1u1alUQ2tFVXoIll5f5Hqi6fjkUIdzNrlJhgKbazoQGsR1X7Ll7b2SPrG1BLOUdFl3NOfJI468sQEqFtio9Zwpxl-bd2LGLXTHU6XGx9PUPj6CltFmaFvR5NigUOD5aHE-Joi4R_Z42LfWZqQmbOy7hQgUw9Tz9NcST6Hc6x1Kju_Sd0mtMhH-JAk-2GXRSc5iZhfu3YSAckbF-nZ-FOdz0OJqq4NAN16WKXWMqn9XSdPiLZNJj2TWOYzZ_7ltvWulz8vKsYCMB8fESxyz5WS0t4xTjJr-nm6_PuDlI9D3_i4ARo63taiREGt5acPcTk1ZBoOsVQ7s5aWbRIi6OeG8hT34rpp2gtyVPwjl4WRew%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=928593fc78dd4f9cab2908cd055a579e&_e=4qt3-Ta6ey6oP1d-sE0sdljOhmc_VKQLTlYkWgMam9s1u1alUQ2tFVXoIll5f5Hqi6fjkUIdzNrlJhgKbazoQGsR1X7Ll7b2SPrG1BLOUdFl3NOfJI468sQEqFtio9Zwpxl-bd2LGLXTHU6XGx9PUPj6CltFmaFvR5NigUOD5aHE-Joi4R_Z42LfWZqQmbOy7hQgUw9Tz9NcST6Hc6x1Kju_Sd0mtMhH-JAk-2GXRSc5iZhfu3YSAckbF-nZ-FOdT85YfScFIalEBZV5ZnFxxNkDg4y8z5YK_CUjVB8JUDwCeRDKfNXK7G-9dHQMzk7wSyD9tZlKoHDlJ-IjGfP8R6rYvmmoMCCaxDMBFialgwNZ-YTx8SKwWvW8N3V-wCFnrLO9OrfsHH2VPy9P4ws4sA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=928593fc78dd4f9cab2908cd055a579e&_e=4qt3-Ta6ey6oP1d-sE0sdljOhmc_VKQLTlYkWgMam9s1u1alUQ2tFVXoIll5f5Hqi6fjkUIdzNrlJhgKbazoQGsR1X7Ll7b2SPrG1BLOUdFl3NOfJI468sQEqFtio9Zwpxl-bd2LGLXTHU6XGx9PUPj6CltFmaFvR5NigUOD5aHE-Joi4R_Z42LfWZqQmbOy7hQgUw9Tz9NcST6Hc6x1Kju_Sd0mtMhH-JAk-2GXRSc5iZhfu3YSAckbF-nZ-FOdnvp09nUtDvV5ZWgblTj0TWHeEoU_M2nSTZSPsilrKgO1rvZGyXz-IQ7E_y-TK1lJYNnyqJHCjTwIH109zZquw8H6H78OJlzlGTty1lBr3nILVD1C-OZaczoZbdra6XvGv0CYUN4ykns7wY1CnyqXLg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution

_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
