subject: Biden suffers an awful federal court loss that could change everything
body:
DAILY NEWS | July 14, 2024

Biden suffers an
awful federal court loss that could change everything
The president's losing streak
continues. Ever since that awful debate in June, he can't buy a
win.

As Biden suffers an awful federal
court loss that could change everything.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Gavin Newsom makes final
presidential election decision that left Democrats' jaws on the
floor

The radical Leftist
governor is a popular pick to replace Biden in the 2024 election.
His decision to run would send shockwaves throughout the country.

➞ Continue Reading

Democrats fell to their
knees after receiving this devastating news from a key 2024 swing
state

The 2024 elections
will make or break the radical Left this November. But their
hopes to win them are looking very grim at the moment.
➞ Continue Reading

Top doctor exposes Biden's
free-falling health in this bombshell video

Democrats are
panicking. They only have weeks to figure out what they're going
to do.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eda69646364f0eb2079de23141a273&_e=Y5qZCQdyUn8tCN2YJEIeylnEliiYRbdf3KuRkEZ4fDvQlG-z_BhO9CeiipXR_IhILwBstGPFJqFpAGOfTPveKXe1BHahkmFbKjot1Ea7SL3pSzWzC7WPRy65WStF4WX590CAiur9i31ID4zThQW8Uid2Ssh5HNzDQZV3xq32ez1uc6V4J3EaGDWCYaaLrNOdJKS57hQBd3gS2xAnctdxJ4JbffoewS0luNijb0LLb45LfFsefCyn1vXevC9NbWAzCGpGLEFuXfIXa8zcDMAY5l5LAmiT38bIZV80LgrXKifpz4ryUlrIsRJ7bYXnXeMsmRxXM9E9dMEcgqJoqb_3sY84mq7wNUM7mJekK6MvyQUoGaWQZK7aKxiyM3MTJWJXFjGfMsEuoRb3eP_HqoxVHA%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1eda69646364f0eb2079de23141a273&_e=Y5qZCQdyUn8tCN2YJEIeylnEliiYRbdf3KuRkEZ4fDvQlG-z_BhO9CeiipXR_IhILwBstGPFJqFpAGOfTPveKXe1BHahkmFbKjot1Ea7SL3pSzWzC7WPRy65WStF4WX590CAiur9i31ID4zThQW8Uid2Ssh5HNzDQZV3xq32ez1uc6V4J3EaGDWCYaaLrNOdJKS57hQBd3gS2xAnctdxJ4JbffoewS0luNijb0LLb44xoZdLH7uYLiYUpQnPPpFcl88QmrGRSJ3O0c4QLJNfVE8ORXJWmDtf6gF-JPjIW0Cp0nJKbJTQoIcmdOF7O26GkwdSNQoJAtE7MlNcpnQCKtA5pzDJbd1ZEBQLPNMfO9MCdB3wWfIxedQcqOKcb_gouj137uIqnkt-v7rF-M9biA%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

This work explores the deep-seated debates around free-market capitalism and its alternatives

| | Dear Friend, I'm excited to share an insightful eBook from the Hoover Institution, "Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism." This work explores the deep-seated debates around free-market capitalism and its alternatives, and you can [get your free copy at this link.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9HPQlhVQFoJTLzyspXGuiw~~/AARclAA~/RgRodlW8P0TEaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy9wZXJzb25hbC1mcmVlZG9tLWFuZC10aGUtbW9yYWwtY2FzZS1mb3ItY2FwaXRhbGlzbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tb3JhbF9jYXNlX2NhcGl0YWxpc20mdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Tk5fUEEtVUNOLTIwMjQwNzE0Jm9sYz0zOTM4NFcDc3BjQgpmkrG6k2YQrnuHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

In the eBook, Russell Roberts challenges the common view that capitalism is based on greed and results in inequality. He argues that free-market competition leads to innovation and better outcomes for consumers and workers.

Ayaan Hirsi Ali, drawing from her experiences growing up in socialist Somalia, illustrates how capitalism can enhance personal freedom and improve living standards. Her powerful narrative shows how economic systems shape individual lives.

This eBook is part of the Human Prosperity Project, which offers scholarly analyses of various economic systems and their impacts on prosperity and well-being.

This eBook provides a balanced perspective on why capitalism might be the more humane and effective choice in a time of growing traction for socialist ideas.

[Click here to request your free copy of "Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism."](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9HPQlhVQFoJTLzyspXGuiw~~/AARclAA~/RgRodlW8P0TEaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy9wZXJzb25hbC1mcmVlZG9tLWFuZC10aGUtbW9yYWwtY2FzZS1mb3ItY2FwaXRhbGlzbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tb3JhbF9jYXNlX2NhcGl0YWxpc20mdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Tk5fUEEtVUNOLTIwMjQwNzE0Jm9sYz0zOTM4NFcDc3BjQgpmkrG6k2YQrnuHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Best regards,
Greg Stamps

## [** _President Trump Shot. Survives Assassination Attempt. (UPDATED)_**](https://ssspl.mjt.)
---
| [](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AWUAAEjxSRcAAc4IXboAA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBmk8fXt3LwtK5OQ2etaty6qwJEmwAjuaE/3/7K_)
---
Former President Donald Trump survived an assassination attempt on Saturday. Shortly after taking the stage at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, shots rang out. The former president was struck in the ear and fell to the ground. After several moments of uncertainty, the Secret Service brought Trump to his feet and rushed him to a vehicle. The former president was taken to a local hospital and was later released.

News reports also indicated one rally goer had been killed by a gunshot wound to the head and a second rally goer was critically wounded. The assassin, who was perched on a rooftop roughly 150 yards away, was shot in the head and killed by a Secret Service counter snipper team.

clean_body: Latest updates on the assassination attempt of Donald Trump | | | | | | Former President Donald Trump survived an assassination attempt on Saturday. Shortly after taking the stage at a rally in Butler, Pennsylvania, shots rang out. The former president was struck in the ear and fell to the ground. After several moments of uncertainty, the Secret Service brought Trump to his feet and rushed him to a vehicle. The former president was taken to a local hospital and was later released. News reports also indicated one rally goer had been killed by a gunshot wound to the head and a second rally goer was critically wounded. The assassin, who was perched on a rooftop roughly 150 yards away, was shot in the head and killed by a Secret Service counter snipper team. LATEST UPDATES... By Jessie Yeung, CNN By Trump Jonathan Turley, The Hill By Philip Wegmann By Disclose TV By Donald Trump, TruthSocial By Roger Clemons, X By Dave Lawler, Axios By Nico Hines, Daily Beast | PLEASE SHARE OUR CONTENT WITH YOUR FRIENDS AND FAMILY | | | | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT... name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Students fake teachers' profiles on TikTok – face no real consequences
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6a3028ad21&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Students fake teachers’ profiles on TikTok and face no real consequences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=211a92d368&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Students at Great Valley Middle School in Chester County created twenty-two fictitious TikTok accounts of their teachers, according to a[ statement](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef2dcb9792&e=b7b3eddce2) issued by the Great Valley School District on June 13, 2024. While the incidents occurred back in February this year, they were only recently reported upon by the[ New York Times](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e281f68c50&e=b7b3eddce2). The counterfeited accounts contained disparaging posts, ranging from racist to homophobic to pornographic, according to the Great Valley Teachers’ Union president’s comments made at the March 18, 2024[ meeting](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3d6397331b&e=b7b3eddce2). Neil Young, a veteran social studies teacher at Great Valley Middle School, who is married with four children, was one of the victims of the students’ destructive behavior. Students created a fake account with his name that insinuated that he was gay and involved with another teacher at the school. The students combined pictures to make it appear that the two were in bed together. **Why It Matters.** Young disagrees with the district’s characterization of the egregious behavior. He said that students used their district-issued iPads to take some of the pictures used in the TikTok posts in the school building during school hours. Additionally, he does not believe that the district adequately investigated the situation. Rather, “teachers did a lot of the investigative work on their own” to discover the fake accounts. Young also faults law enforcement for their lack of appropriate responsiveness to the issue. According to him, teachers contacted both local police precincts and the Chester County DA’s office, and the concerns were “blown off.” **Quotable.** “There is nothing more dangerous than not holding children accountable,” said Neil Young, a middle school teacher who was the victim of a fake TikTok account created by his students. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b655e72cc6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Second ‘hidden’ death discovered at troubled Delco prison](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cb4dfe9669&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
Documents newly obtained by Broad + Liberty show the Delaware County prison had a sixth death in 2022, but the fatality was of the type that allowed the county to escape having to count it on its death tally reporting to the Pennsylvania Department of Corrections. In addition to reporting such numbers to the state, the prison must also report deaths in order to comply with the federal Death in Custody Reporting Act, or DCRA. If this newly discovered death was not reported to the federal government, the prison may have run afoul of that law. **Why It Matters. **Rapp’s death came at a time of remarkable transition for the prison. In October 2021, the county voted to end nearly three decades of using private companies to manage the prison. Even though the first official day of government management wouldn’t come until April 6, 2022, the date was merely a formality in the transfer of power. The county had already selected Williams as the county’s warden months earlier, giving her a start date of January 31. Sources with intimate knowledge of the prison say when Williams was installed, the facility was de facto under government management, and she had full control of the daily decision making from her first moments on the job. Williams is familiar with the method of getting inmates quickly released from custody when in the throes of a medical emergency. Prior to becoming the Delaware County warden, she was the deputy warden of health services for Allegheny County. While there, she[ defended](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f673f0d591&e=b7b3eddce2) the quick-release-from-custody method according to minutes from Allegheny County Jail Oversight Board meetings. **Quotable.** “The letter and spirit of the federal Death in Custody Reporting Act is clear: An inmate who is transferred to a medical facility and dies there should be reported.” – the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e8c888441d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Teachers’ union president is just another political boss](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=096bf322ee&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Pennsylvania Senate makes smart moves for student success](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=776b588d3d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Upper Darby pays back over $40,000 spent on toy drives, holiday dinners](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=909459ecf5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Philadelphia’s Walk of Fame used to be about the music](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1800be5828&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Rep. Seth Grove: The broken budget process](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=794b646f7b&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
What happens when an unstoppable force meets an immovable object? It’s called the Biden campaign. There are any number of articles you could read about Biden’s steadfast refusal to withdraw from a campaign that his fellow Democrats increasingly see as doomed. [Mark Leibovitch’s piece in the _Atlantic_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f5bc7376af&e=b7b3eddce2) is as good a vantage point as any to look at the growing dismay among left wing partisans. “President Joe Biden,” he writes, “is acting like one of history’s most negligent and pigheaded leaders at a crucial moment, and right now, we are all pedestrians.”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Beth Ann Rosica Students at Great Valley Middle School in Chester County created twenty-two fictitious TikTok accounts of their teachers, according to a issued by the Great Valley School District on June 13, 2024. While the incidents occurred back in February this year, they were only recently reported upon by the. The counterfeited accounts contained disparaging posts, ranging from racist to homophobic to pornographic, according to the Great Valley Teachers’ Union president’s comments made at the March 18, 2024. Neil Young, a veteran social studies teacher at Great Valley Middle School, who is married with four children, was one of the victims of the students’ destructive behavior. Students created a fake account with his name that insinuated that he was gay and involved with another teacher at the school. The students combined pictures to make it appear that the two were in bed together. Why It Matters. Young disagrees with the district’s characterization of the egregious behavior. He said that students used their district-issued iPads to take some of the pictures used in the TikTok posts in the school building during school hours. Additionally, he does not believe that the district adequately investigated the situation. Rather, “teachers did a lot of the investigative work on their own” to discover the fake accounts. Young also faults law enforcement for their lack of appropriate responsiveness to the issue. According to him, teachers contacted both local police precincts and the Chester County DA’s office, and the concerns were “blown off.” Quotable. “There is nothing more dangerous than not holding children accountable,” said Neil Young, a middle school teacher who was the victim of a fake TikTok account created by his students. | | 2. By Todd Shepherd Documents newly obtained by Broad + Liberty show the Delaware County prison had a sixth death in 2022, but the fatality was of the type that allowed the county to escape having to count it on its death tally reporting to the Pennsylvania Department of Corrections. In addition to reporting such numbers to the state, the prison must also report deaths in order to comply with the federal Death in Custody Reporting Act, or DCRA. If this newly discovered death was not reported to the federal government, the prison may have run afoul of that law. Why It Matters. Rapp’s death came at a time of remarkable transition for the prison. In October 2021, the county voted to end nearly three decades of using private companies to manage the prison. Even though the first official day of government management wouldn’t come until April 6, 2022, the date was merely a formality in the transfer of power. The county had already selected Williams as the county’s warden months earlier, giving her a start date of January 31. Sources with intimate knowledge of the prison say when Williams was installed, the facility was de facto under government management, and she had full control of the daily decision making from her first moments on the job. Williams is familiar with the method of getting inmates quickly released from custody when in the throes of a medical emergency. Prior to becoming the Delaware County warden, she was the deputy warden of health services for Allegheny County. While there, she the quick-release-from-custody method according to minutes from Allegheny County Jail Oversight Board meetings. Quotable. “The letter and spirit of the federal Death in Custody Reporting Act is clear: An inmate who is transferred to a medical facility and dies there should be reported.” – the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 5\. What we're reading What happens when an unstoppable force meets an immovable object? It’s called the Biden campaign. There are any number of articles you could read about Biden’s steadfast refusal to withdraw from a campaign that his fellow Democrats increasingly see as doomed. is as good a vantage point as any to look at the growing dismay among left wing partisans. “President Joe Biden,” he writes, “is acting like one of history’s most negligent and pigheaded leaders at a crucial moment, and right now, we are all pedestrians.” | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. name: Angie Shepherd, Journeyman Alumni
subject: Will you help bridge the gap with God's Word?
body:
Our commitment to providing Bibles and Scripture portions to people and communities worldwide is unwavering.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmm7ompdh6sjfb6p773be1ekac9fdlf8vfuf5q00_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjjm9p34c9h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,

As followers of Jesus, we are all compelled to address a critical need that exists across the globe:**Billions of people wake up each day without the comfort and guidance of the Word of God in their native language.**

In some regions, entire communities have yet to receive a single verse of scripture, while others face a severe shortage of Bibles.

I'm reaching out to you because we believe that together, we can make a profound impact on the lives of those who are yearning for the transformative power of the gospel.

**Will you provide Bibles to people groups who have yet to hear God 's Word with a gift today?**

Our commitment to providing Bibles and Scripture portions to people and communities worldwide is unwavering. However, we recognize that we cannot do this alone. We need your help to ensure that the gospel reaches every corner of the world.

When you give today, you will:
* Not only pass a Bible along but potentially change lives eternally.
* Help support over 3,500 IMB missionaries on the ground, teaching the Bible and bringing hope to spiritually lost communities.
* Answer God's call to share His Word with those who have yet to hear it.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv4bqcj5nt5etpse2mjsk8os9jtn6kjt7ug8buu8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjjm9p34c9h2bs)
You can click on the secure link below to make a donation of any amount and bring the transformative power of the gospel to those who need it the most.

[https://www.imb.org/generosity/gods-word-for-the-nations-confirmation/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7t778qm7cg6908bmnq81s2sq24qu3iccras2080_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjjm9p34c9h2bs)

Your support is more than a financial contribution; it's a beacon of hope, a lifeline to those who have yet to experience the love and salvation found in Jesus Christ.

Thank you for considering this urgent call to action. Together, we can make a difference in the lives of countless individuals and communities worldwide.

In faith,

Angie Shepherd
Journeyman Alumni
Prayer and Missions Advocate
---
---
---
| |

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA 23230 | (804) 353-0515
---

subject: From the past 3 years – my 4 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
I wanted to share the reasons behind that decision in hopes you will join me in supporting this desperately needed work. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88866989/485402972/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240714reasons_N_JH_NO_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZTg3ODliLWVkNDEtZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NuKlwnQZ0ly9-YRt6N86qU01JX8RPpg7MMt_ldXqVDc=)
---
Hi Peter,

My name is Jessalyn Haefele, and I have been a proud supporter of Her Bold Move through both my time and my funds for more than 3 years. Today, I wanted to share the reasons behind that decision in hopes that you will join me in supporting this desperately needed work.

**I donated to HBM because I have experienced firsthand many times throughout my life being left out of important conversations and decisions happening in rooms full of men.** The only way we are going to be a part of the policies and decisions that affect us is if we are represented equally across all forms of government at all levels. I want people who share my values and understand my experiences to be representing me.

**I donated to HBM because I believe it’s important to make change at the local level, in my own neighborhood, before we can expect anything to change at the national level.** HBM is one of the best organizations that supports women candidates who are working to create change in their communities – and the only national org prioritizing the lives of the millions of women who live in states with abortion bans.

**I donated to HBM because access to reproductive healthcare has directly affected my life and the lives of so many of my family and friends.** I refuse to live in a world where women do not have autonomy over their own bodies, and I am committed to helping elect women to office who will defend those rights fiercely.

**I donated to HBM because I like knowing that my donation is going towards helping women who are stepping up to run in elections where they might not be getting the support or visibility of a “career” politician.** I like knowing I am supporting women who are standing up to outdated ideologies and working tirelessly for change in communities that are often overlooked. I like being part of an organization that is committed to uplifting all of us – not only in the way HBM supports its qualified candidates but also in the way they support future generations of women leaders through their student fellowship program and community outreach programs.

[**I am deeply proud to support Her Bold Move. If any of the reasons I shared resonate with you, please make a donation of $20.24 or more so this phenomenal organization can continue to support fiercely pro-choice women candidates running up and down the ballot to move our nation forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88866990/485402973/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240714reasons_N_JH_NO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZTg3ODliLWVkNDEtZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NuKlwnQZ0ly9-YRt6N86qU01JX8RPpg7MMt_ldXqVDc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88866991/485402974/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240714reasons_N_JH_NO_7_NG_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZTg3ODliLWVkNDEtZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NuKlwnQZ0ly9-YRt6N86qU01JX8RPpg7MMt_ldXqVDc=)

---
I believe that yesterday, Saturday July 13 2024, was a very sad day for the United States.

This was an attempt to [assassinate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d6fae192-8160-4544-a3bb-0a9e8511f7ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a president. We don't yet know more. We know nothing less.

Every American president is not just a person, but a symbol for our nation itself. We have seen horrific attacks on Members of Congress and the courts. But this is a dramatic escalation. It is a categorically different class of violence.

I reject it.

I recently ran for office, and learned so much I hope to share soon. Here's one thing I learned:

Republicans are not the bad guys. They're not evil. They're just not. Stop calling them extreme MAGA Republicans. They're not extreme; they're just populists. Stop calling Bernie Sanders a communist or an extremist. He's just a Scandinavian-style democratic socialist - and populist, too. Democracy will survive Trump. Capitalism would survive Bernie. America endures. But we are not in our finest hour.

Rather than decrying populism and maligning populists, all of us - especially those of us who, like me, are elite educated white collar professionals - must look in the mirror and ask ourselves what we are doing to help make a country that works damn well for us work for all Americans.

Most important, we must love.

And if we do all this, I have no doubt, we will repair this breach.
> _" Those from among you will rebuild the ancient ruins; You will raise up the age-old foundations; And you will be called the repairer of the breach, The restorer of the streets in which to dwell." _-Isaiah 58:12
Reach out today to someone whom you have wronged. Forgive those who have wronged you.

Come together. Make peace. Seek out difficult political conversations. Avoid blame.

And vote.

__**_MEMO FROM_**
**_PRESIDENT TRUMP_**
Friend,
Thank you to everyone for your thoughts and prayers yesterday, as it was God alone who prevented the unthinkable from happening.

We will FEAR NOT, but instead remain resilient in our Faith and Defiant in the face of Wickedness.
Our love goes out to the other victims and their families. We pray for the recovery of those who were wounded, and hold in our hearts the memory of the citizen who was so horribly killed.
In this moment, it is more important than ever that we stand United, and show our True Character as Americans, remaining Strong and Determined, and not allowing Evil to Win.
I truly love our Country, and love you all, and look forward to speaking to our Great Nation this week from Wisconsin.
Remember this: together we will Make America Great Again!
[MAGA](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxcUUFvnDwU_DXm5pV5xhgOHJIlfNJ3WKlppaa9IIMfu25t42ITmn9fQTY99DpvZjwzVi5YM701RD4SgJvRkQAQ_kAAHj7B189f8Aklff7-PFD1hP9f9iucCUB6C_iXenc5oVPG7qhsM93AWME4ZtjkElgtGQiR3RomJMihkhWv9cCEEDiJAkVR5YLjVNaZaYBBwWRe5CKXnJ-kFnU56AFHhkrLiRRsM_6kZ6-s_pGW1YXTOLvMNreUQjwidQS6bdtO13lavXa4Ewh0E4EuLBiNRp_oIaUR8WekcQ1hXhKd5oUOa7K40KDoqxmTcZHwbk2ud6jN6ghv7z3LHYzzuoxIeOtH29-HuJ9G5YIyV094-16I2tB_lOuP1_sFY5h9xJ73Me-dMv5DPPuEPr0b01-Pl_9-X17wPBAoe2-NJrz9Bzx-j7fVUKtzxV6-ZUujw2asNbGUpGDXPfWx1GsDfwIAAP__eHahBA)

name: Nick Begich
subject: Standing with President Trump and Honoring the Victims
body:
The PA rally attack shows we can't give ground to those who would terrorize us | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=e36ab869f7&e=6679001ba0)
---
|
## Standing with President Trump, and the Victims of Violence

Dear Friends,

I hope this message finds you well, though I know many of us are deeply troubled by the events of yesterday. As one friend put it, "I'm eager to get back to living in precedented times."

The assassination attempt on former President Trump is a stark reminder of the turbulent times we live in. As many of you know, I have been a steadfast supporter of President Trump since his 2016 campaign, endorsing him before he had even won a single primary. I did so because I believed, and still believe, that he is the leader Alaska and our nation need.

Despite being escorted out of the venue by the Secret Service, bloodied, President Trump delivered an inspiring call for us to keep fighting. The iconic photos of him, resolute and defiant, embody his indomitable spirit. It is this fighting spirit that we should all strive to share and uphold, especially in times of adversity.

There is much we still don't know about yesterday's horrific event. Questions about the motivations of the would-be assassin remain unanswered; we still don't understand how the shooter managed to get so close and into such a strategic position without being stopped. We await quick and candid responses from the authorities. While the cowardly shooter failed to assassinate President Trump, an innocent bystander tragically lost their life, and two others remain in critical condition. Our hearts go out to their families, and they need our support now more than ever.

In response to this violence, President Trump and his team have set up a GoFundMe to raise money for the victims' families. I urge you to contribute if you can; every bit helps those who are suffering from this senseless violence. I'm including [a link here](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=7c6eca7803&e=6679001ba0), or click the button below.

We are living in a time of heightened tensions and extreme rhetoric. False accusations against President Trump, such as being labeled a fascist or an existential threat to democracy, have real-world consequences. While I firmly believe in the nearly unfettered right to free speech granted by the First Amendment, we must remember that our rights come with responsibilities. It is time for those who believe it’s acceptable to spread falsehoods for political gain to do some serious soul-searching.

Our thoughts remain with President Trump and his family, and even more with the families who are enduring catastrophic loss. Let us come together in support and solidarity during this difficult time.

Thank you for your continued support.

Warm regards,

Nick Begich

clean_body: The PA rally attack shows we can't give ground to those who would terrorize us | | | | | | | | Standing with President Trump, and the Victims of Violence Dear Friends, I hope this message finds you well, though I know many of us are deeply troubled by the events of yesterday. As one friend put it, "I'm eager to get back to living in precedented times." The assassination attempt on former President Trump is a stark reminder of the turbulent times we live in. As many of you know, I have been a steadfast supporter of President Trump since his 2016 campaign, endorsing him before he had even won a single primary. I did so because I believed, and still believe, that he is the leader Alaska and our nation need. Despite being escorted out of the venue by the Secret Service, bloodied, President Trump delivered an inspiring call for us to keep fighting. The iconic photos of him, resolute and defiant, embody his indomitable spirit. It is this fighting spirit that we should all strive to share and uphold, especially in times of adversity. There is much we still don't know about yesterday's horrific event. Questions about the motivations of the would-be assassin remain unanswered; we still don't understand how the shooter managed to get so close and into such a strategic position without being stopped. We await quick and candid responses from the authorities. While the cowardly shooter failed to assassinate President Trump, an innocent bystander tragically lost their life, and two others remain in critical condition. Our hearts go out to their families, and they need our support now more than ever. In response to this violence, President Trump and his team have set up a GoFundMe to raise money for the victims' families. I urge you to contribute if you can; every bit helps those who are suffering from this senseless violence. I'm including , or click the button below. We are living in a time of heightened tensions and extreme rhetoric. False accusations against President Trump, such as being labeled a fascist or an existential threat to democracy, have real-world consequences. While I firmly believe in the nearly unfettered right to free speech granted by the First Amendment, we must remember that our rights come with responsibilities. It is time for those who believe it’s acceptable to spread falsehoods for political gain to do some serious soul-searching. Our thoughts remain with President Trump and his family, and even more with the families who are enduring catastrophic loss. Let us come together in support and solidarity during this difficult time. Thank you for your continued support. Warm regards, Nick Begich | "Click HERE to support the victims of yesterday's attack" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Alaskans for Nick Begich, All rights reserved.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs63uqYWIN

I'm reaching out to share something important with
you...something that could expand your horizons.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os63uqYWIN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're
having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something
important with you...something that could expand your horizons.

I'm talking about studying American history!

As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay
explains in our online course "The Great American Story: A Land
of Hope," studying history can broaden your perspective and help
you understand different ways of living.

Compare that to The New York Times' "1619
Project," now a multi-part series streaming online.

The "1619 Project" locates the founding of
America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores,
rather than in 1776, when the Declaration of Independence
declared that all men are created equal with unalienable
God-given rights.

According to the "1619 Project," the key to
understanding America is not freedom but slavery-and the
project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into
every home, including yours. We must counter this false and
dishonest historical narrative with the truth.

That's why we've turned our online course,
"The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," into a DVD set, and
I'd like you to have a copy.

"The Great American Story: A Land of Hope"
presents a full, unbiased account of America's past. We produced
this course to restore the kind of intelligent
patriotism-especially among our young people-essential to
restoring free government.

You'll be excited to learn that "The Great
American Story: A Land of Hope" is a powerful counterweight to
The New York Times' "1619 Project," which tells people,
especially children, that America is essentially an unjust
nation-the opposite of our nation's unifying principles.

Today, you can claim a DVD copy of "The Great
American Story: A Land of Hope" for your home library or give it
as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means
of preserving liberty.

Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy
today.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63382016:s63uqYWIN:m:3:2627245898:37DF584C40DE8A353A44F13C3300C1FC:r

Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale
College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Despite what The New York Times' "1619
Project" says, our nation's history is unifying. That's why we've
produced a full, unbiased account of America's past with "The
Great American Story: A Land of Hope," now available on DVD. You
can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of
$100 or more using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63382016:s63uqYWIN:m:3:2627245898:37DF584C40DE8A353A44F13C3300C1FC:r

Act today because quantities are limited!

Thank you so much for helping us promote
intelligent patriotism-especially among younger Americans.

name: Jill Stein 2024
subject: DNC Chair Attacked Jill!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Did you miss what the top Dem said about Jill?

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=1)
---
Peter, What happened on X (formerly Twitter) last week was incredible. In case you didn't see the first email about this, we are resending it to you so you don't miss it. The DNC is at it again... spreading lies about Jill online.

Take a look at this: DNC Chair Jaime Harrison took the time out of his “busy” schedule to try to prop up Biden’s floundering campaign by [lying about Jill Stein on X](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PFt0RQJG8CjCGB0W6jg0LCyD2Vj7h9oTfdgx3nkA434&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=2).
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=3)
---
After the head of the Democratic Party attacked Jill with a debunked smear, she responded by bringing up his actual job history before his promotion to DNC chair:
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=4)
---
This triggered a long tirade from Harrison blaming Jill for supposedly taking votes that belong to the Democrats and scapegoating her for their failures. With every exchange, he became more insulting and unhinged, even as Jill kept bringing facts to counter his smears:
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=5)
---
Incredibly, the nation’s top Democrat kept flailing at Jill with increasingly ludicrous attacks, even implying that she’s best friends with Kim Jong-Un (?!)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=6)
---
The DNC has been attacking our campaign from day one, but what we hadn’t seen until yesterday was the head of the anti-Democratic Party publicly trumpeting his contempt for democracy and truth. **But one thing is clear: The political elites are scared of Jill Stein.** They know that our campaign is breaking through the duopoly’s narrative by organizing around real issues the anti-Democratic Party doesn’t want to talk about: like their genocide in Gaza and their increasing attacks on our democracy.

That’s why the DNC is going back to their old playbook: spread lies to cover up the truth about Joe Biden.

Joe Biden is heading for a big loss _and even Democrats don’t want him in this race_.

Jaime Harrison knows it. The American people know it. **That’s why Jill urgently needs your support to fight back against these escalating attacks and supercharge our growing movement for people, planet, and peace.** [**_Peter, will you donate $25 or any amount you can right now to help Jill fight back and keep the focus on our anti-genocide, pro-worker, climate emergency action agenda?_**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=7)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=8 "FIGHT BACK") [FIGHT BACK](https://www.jillstein2024.com/matching?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=8)
---
**In solidarity and gratitude,** Team Jill Stein
---
P.S. - Don’t forget that our campaign gives all proceeds after cost when you purchase our ceasefire bumper sticker and Gaza rally sign to United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA).
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=jEL8rT9O0XNDGBXYcmXFslrdBxXgP6GekYmc83-NpqK_Uzh2O4XphJDfhUne27FQ&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=9 "WEAR YOUR SUPPORT") [WEAR YOUR SUPPORT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=jEL8rT9O0XNDGBXYcmXFslrdBxXgP6GekYmc83-NpqK_Uzh2O4XphJDfhUne27FQ&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=resend_dnc_attack_7_14&n=9)

name: Heather Williams (via DLCC.org)
subject: Yesterday, we experienced a terrible shock to our democratic system.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Political violence like this sacrifices everything we and generations have worked so hard to build in our country. It puts at risk everything we want for ourselves and to leave our children. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Yesterday, we experienced a terrible shock to our democratic system when a young man attempted to assassinate Former President Trump. I am saddened for the family and friends of the audience member who was killed, concerned about those who were injured, and relieved that President Trump escaped with only a minor injury. As a DLCC community, I implore us to stand strongly against this violence. As someone who has worked tirelessly for Democrats and democracy shoulder to shoulder with state legislators and candidates from New York, to Iowa, to California, in our communities, in our kids' schools – this type of violence is everything we work against. It is everything we teach that we are not about. **Political violence like this sacrifices everything we and generations have worked so hard to build in our country. It puts at risk everything we want for ourselves and to leave our children.** I am grateful you are part of our community because together, we will continue to be the foundation of democracy and for Democrats, as we work to ensure no one ever has to endure what that audience or the former President went through. All my best, Heather Williams
President
Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee

|
|
---
Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee
1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Contributions or gifts to DLCC PAC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and DLCC PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. clean_body: Political violence like this sacrifices everything we and generations have worked so hard to build in our country. It puts at risk everything we want for ourselves and to leave our children. | | | | | ---|--- Yesterday, we experienced a terrible shock to our democratic system when a young man attempted to assassinate Former President Trump. I am saddened for the family and friends of the audience member who was killed, concerned about those who were injured, and relieved that President Trump escaped with only a minor injury. As a DLCC community, I implore us to stand strongly against this violence. As someone who has worked tirelessly for Democrats and democracy shoulder to shoulder with state legislators and candidates from New York, to Iowa, to California, in our communities, in our kids' schools – this type of violence is everything we work against. It is everything we teach that we are not about. Political violence like this sacrifices everything we and generations have worked so hard to build in our country. It puts at risk everything we want for ourselves and to leave our children. I am grateful you are part of our community because together, we will continue to be the foundation of democracy and for Democrats, as we work to ensure no one ever has to endure what that audience or the former President went through. All my best, Heather Williams President Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee | | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Tim Kaine
subject: I am deeply distraught over the tragedy at President Trump’s rally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Friends, family, and supporters:
Like people all across the country, I am deeply distraught over the tragedy at President Trump’s rally in Pennsylvania yesterday.
I’m relieved he is safe, and Anne and I are praying for the families who lost loved ones, those who were at the rally, and all who were impacted by this.
I also pray for our country — that we reject violence in deed, word and thought.
Right now more than ever, leaders need to step up and show that we can treat all with respect.
-Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
Kaine for Virginia
P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313
United States

The Left is woke, not AWAKE...
But yesterday's assassination attempt on President Trump cracked eyes wide open, shifting folks from the woke virtue signaling camp straight into reality.
That's the mess we've been wading through since around 2008--a stark refusal to live in the real world, to trust actual science, or to anchor ourselves in traditional family values, gender norms, and God.
Because _**REALITY**_ declares the biggest threat to Western Civilization isn't "white supremacy"; it's wokeism--the stubborn refusal to face reality for what it truly is.
_**REALITY**_ tells us that men, women, boys, and girls are biologically and spiritually fearfully and wonderfully made in the image of God, and any attempt to alter that through physical modification is yielding to a spiritual falsehood. It simply isn't real.
And lastly, _**REALITY**_ says that skin color doesn't shape, sway, or dictate ideology; culture does.
The inputs to your mind matter.
The voices you heed matter.
What you immerse yourself in and give yourself over to... MATTERS.
But you know this.
The Apostle Paul knew it well too, warning us thousands of years ago as he wrote to the Christians in Rome:
> "For the wrath of God is revealed from heaven against all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men, who by their unrighteousness suppress the truth. For what can be known about God is plain to them, because God has shown it to them. For his invisible attributes, namely, his eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly perceived, ever since the creation of the world, in the things that have been made. So they are without excuse. _**For although they knew God, they did not honor him as God or give thanks to him, but they became futile in their thinking, and their foolish hearts were darkened.**_ Claiming to be wise, they became fools, and exchanged the glory of the immortal God for images resembling mortal man and birds and animals and creeping things.
> Therefore God gave them up in the lusts of their hearts to impurity, to the dishonoring of their bodies among themselves, because they exchanged the truth about God for a lie and worshiped and served the creature rather than the Creator, who is blessed forever! Amen.
> For this reason God gave them up to dishonorable passions. For their women exchanged natural relations for those that are contrary to nature; and the men likewise gave up natural relations with women and were consumed with passion for one another, men committing shameless acts with men and receiving in themselves the due penalty for their error.
> And since they did not see fit to acknowledge God, God gave them up to a debased mind to do what ought not to be done. They were filled with all manner of unrighteousness, evil, covetousness, malice. They are full of envy, murder, strife, deceit, maliciousness. They are gossips, slanderers, haters of God, insolent, haughty, boastful, inventors of evil, disobedient to parents, foolish, faithless, heartless, ruthless. Though they know God's righteous decree that those who practice such things deserve to die, they not only do them but give approval to those who practice them."
> (Romans 1: 18-:32)
**So, choose wisely who you listen to...**
Be discerning about who and what you lend your ear to.
Because the guy who tried to assassinate Trump was tuned into the wrong frequencies. From what I've observed, he was woke, but clearly not AWAKE.
He swallowed the lies.
He bought into the hype.
_**And it turned him into a monster.**_
But for the grace of God, we could all go astray.
So, let us seek truth with humility and compassion, guided by wisdom and discernment.
[Follow Lenney on Twitter/X](https://substack.com/redirect/37e9b879-f86e-4a90-964a-6ce30b350fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: Will you help OLCV smoothly sail into the November election?
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88875321/485430044/59267164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNWY5NDkwLTAyNDItZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oj-bWac15IEABcXbyXHDOHJmRRgaujHM0aWyOpxhnrA=&emci=f7eca97e-0b3f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=405f9490-0242-ef11-86c3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2107230)Hi Peter, As it heats up outside, we hope you are finding ways to stay cool on one of Oregon’s pristine waterways. The weather isn’t the only thing heating up right now — so is the upcoming election! We need to build the resources now to keep our boat afloat so we can sail into November as cool as a cucumber. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88875323/485430045/59267164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNWY5NDkwLTAyNDItZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oj-bWac15IEABcXbyXHDOHJmRRgaujHM0aWyOpxhnrA=&emci=f7eca97e-0b3f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=405f9490-0242-ef11-86c3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2107230)This summer, we need 50 more new sustainers to join us during our Sustainer Drive. [**Will you consider becoming a monthly donor today so we can reach our goal?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88875324/485430047/59267164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNWY5NDkwLTAyNDItZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oj-bWac15IEABcXbyXHDOHJmRRgaujHM0aWyOpxhnrA=&emci=f7eca97e-0b3f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=405f9490-0242-ef11-86c3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2107230) [**With a monthly commitment of $15 (that’s as much as your Netflix subscription!) more of your donation goes directly to our work, because we can spend less on fundraising, administrative costs, and other resources.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88875325/485430048/59267164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNWY5NDkwLTAyNDItZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oj-bWac15IEABcXbyXHDOHJmRRgaujHM0aWyOpxhnrA=&emci=f7eca97e-0b3f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=405f9490-0242-ef11-86c3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2107230) Members of OLCV’s Sustainer Circle are the backbone of our work, and get access to exclusive perks. A monthly donation of **$15 adds up to $180 over the course of the year, allowing us to recruit 6 new volunteers** to attend campaign events and advocate for the candidates we need to elect this November. **Those six volunteers can talk to over 100 voters about OLCV-endorsed candidates in just three hours.** Imagine the impact we will have if we reach our goal of adding 50 new sustainers — **we could reach over 20,000 voters to elect the climate champions we need.** Our Sustainer Circle members are so important to us at OLCV because it’s their commitment to our work that we depend on to stay afloat and get the work done during critical times like the upcoming election. [**Help us keep the boat afloat this summer and smoothly sail into the November election by becoming a Sustainer Circle member today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/88875326/485430049/59267164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwNWY5NDkwLTAyNDItZWYxMS04NmMzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Oj-bWac15IEABcXbyXHDOHJmRRgaujHM0aWyOpxhnrA=&emci=f7eca97e-0b3f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=405f9490-0242-ef11-86c3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2107230) It’s going to take all of us, but if we all give what we can, it will be smooth sailing from here on out. Sincerely,
Sarah Kline
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator |

clean_body: | | | Peter, As it heats up outside, we hope you are finding ways to stay cool on one of Oregon’s pristine waterways. The weather isn’t the only thing heating up right now — so is the upcoming election! We need to build the resources now to keep our boat afloat so we can sail into November as cool as a cucumber. summer, we need 50 more new sustainers to join us during our Sustainer Drive. Members of OLCV’s Sustainer Circle are the backbone of our work, and get access to exclusive perks. A monthly donation of $15 adds up to $180 over the course of the year, allowing us to recruit 6 new volunteers to attend campaign events and advocate for the candidates we need to elect this November. Those six volunteers can talk to over 100 voters about OLCV-endorsed candidates in just three hours. Imagine the impact we will have if we reach our goal of adding 50 new sustainers — we could reach over 20,000 voters to elect the climate champions we need. Our Sustainer Circle members are so important to us at OLCV because it’s their commitment to our work that we depend on to stay afloat and get the work done during critical times like the upcoming election. It’s going to take all of us, but if we all give what we can, it will be smooth sailing from here on out. Sincerely, Sarah Kline OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

name: Jim Banks
subject: Help out the victims of yesterday’s assassination attempt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
|
---
Friend,

I’m sure by now you’ve seen the shocking and horrific images of yesterday’s assassination attempt targeting President Trump.

In addition to President Trump’s injuries, several rally attendees were wounded, and at least one person tragically lost their life. This disgusting act has no place in America. Now is the time to rally together as Americans, condemn this violence, and help support the victims of this attack.

President Donald Trump has authorized [**this account**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=ae7a4ac3cc20498c95041e147d650d5a&_e=KbZBvw6Ba4HtAh834_Gs7bEJGx2XAPFfOYPC3MzbllLf0eXLCHTpH3RUUhxN8Jc24Zw8uJFGLfizZiyBkwRC12nLPE9LXyT4yntN0siKEd14R45A5YrNDkjemQhIR_XWUUhuRTG3fiHJqO3PyuYrv2BIpYtY_34zcK-V5JTFe_1J8-q8iowJZ-mW8IGW-r_UcEenCi3zDtXqRdHroGIdyZtuM9Qdp7MSIuzQXON2uPootsRdp-0TMx0uzW6CunyaUjwWKnWyiG7c-CDxVh1tAg%3D%3D) as a place for donations to the supporters and families wounded or killed in this brutal and horrific assassination attempt. All donations will be directed to these proud Americans as they grieve and recover. May God bless and unite our nation.

Thank you,

Congressman Jim Banks

| Paid for by Banks for Senate

* * *
# [Yes Political Violence Is Unacceptable](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=146604553&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA0NTUzLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5NzgzNzQsImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3MDM3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ra9CIaauG5zzgb5R09Lx21hU_3-g1Y5ezvJHSuKdn_U)
### But do MAGAs actually believe that?
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=146604553&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA0NTUzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMDk3ODM3NCwiZXhwIjoxNzIzNTcwMzc0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yXGclKz3UdX9R_CkPQMFraRv0tVWC-EXmOrSUzUozig&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=146604553&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA0NTUzLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5NzgzNzQsImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3MDM3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ra9CIaauG5zzgb5R09Lx21hU_3-g1Y5ezvJHSuKdn_U&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=146604553&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA0NTUzLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5NzgzNzQsImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3MDM3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ra9CIaauG5zzgb5R09Lx21hU_3-g1Y5ezvJHSuKdn_U)
---
| | [](https://substack..PimozVcT2a8id5hk3mo-PWQTZ9Tm5903hFD8WCmcB7U?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/yes-political-violence-is-unacceptable?utm_source=email&inbox=true)
---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fT7_-N84OyE3kKsoYkiGJsOYAP-5y349bhVExGhy-hA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=146604553)
By now you've heard that former President Trump suffered a wound to his ear on what appears to be an attempt on his life. The shooter, Thomas Matthew Crooks, killed an innocent bystander and put another in critical condition. Local authorities report that Crooks was killed by law enforcement.
Let's start with the standard disclaimer. Political violence is never acceptable. We are a nation of laws and seek to advance our policies with votes at the ballot box, not with violence and bullets. That said, yes, political violence is unacceptable--but do MAGAs actually believe that? **Let 's Address This.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0a5eb018-72e6-4aac-b9ab-e3890f77399c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: Economic Times
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=146604553&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA0NTUzLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5NzgzNzQsImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3MDM3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ra9CIaauG5zzgb5R09Lx21hU_3-g1Y5ezvJHSuKdn_U)
We don't yet know shooter Thomas Matthew Crooks' motivation, but it is truly fascinating to watch the party running on the platform of [pardoning the violent and deadly January 6 insurrectionists](https://substack.com/redirect/dcf22553-63e5-4814-b390-ff6c03bd6fd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [violently rounding up and deporting 15-20 million of immigrants](https://substack.com/redirect/e42d98b6-b8c6-46cc-9129-afbd78259bdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [funding the genocide in Palestine](https://substack.com/redirect/1d3517e0-d231-497f-a0d1-5b6007aff563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that has killed up to 186,000 per the Lancet, and [celebrating the SCOTUS ruling expanding Presidential immunity](https://substack.com/redirect/20956a1b-fc1b-4b5d-8b58-e9a7d29a8ddd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to include killing a political opponent as an official act--suddenly clutch pearls at political violence and feign outrage at how we got here.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b8fbfd7-230c-46cc-9581-209fa26a7f23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is remarkable to watch the party who incessantly [mocked the attempted murder of Paul Pelosi](https://substack.com/redirect/9fc9280e-4e96-427e-81d0-e87cbdf0abae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), husband of former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, glorified car decals of [President Biden being kidnapped, bound, and gagged](https://substack.com/redirect/2da9b2c6-030a-40b0-b271-18fb8f4ad845?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [call Democrats traitors who deserve the death penalty](https://substack.com/redirect/964c5c33-a428-4e83-ba50-f8c639e61991?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and whose Project 2025 founders claim that "[the country is in the midst of a second American Revolution that will be bloodless if the left allows it to be](https://substack.com/redirect/40b29f81-51a5-46ab-94ff-e3350808f8c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," suddenly wonder how political violence happened?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/338c3428-e209-4428-bf4e-0da5616684be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is beyond comprehension to watch the party who passed dozens of stand your ground laws to [justify murdering civilians and escalating conflicts with violence](https://substack.com/redirect/fde47093-eed2-4157-b1e0-300e9a0c056d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), rather than deescalate them through diplomacy, who passed dozens of [anti-protestor laws justifying running over peaceful protestors with vehicles](https://substack.com/redirect/da3ec303-b3a3-444d-9d5b-3fbc2fa13079?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), rather than allowing law enforcement to peacefully disburse protestors, [expand access to weapons of war even after mass shootings](https://substack.com/redirect/b69246e4-b35f-4174-941f-a3d5311de1aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and even for people who absolutely should not have access to them [while guns become the leading cause of death for children in America](https://substack.com/redirect/3fa2b412-3413-416f-95f4-d951b469b8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--now express outrage at the political violence we witnessed this week.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d04c76ec-0b94-45f6-9766-30df99c99789?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I am an eternal optimist. I hope this is a wake up call for MAGAs that the last decade of violent rhetoric espoused by Donald Trump and the MAGA movement has been the most significant contributor to this point. And that's not hyperbole. A 2020 study by ABC documented that as President, Donald Trump inspired at least [54 acts of political violence even before the January 6 insurrection](https://substack.com/redirect/ee33673c-3f15-4917-b7bc-66ffcc0165a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while the previously four Presidents combined inspired 0 such acts of political violence, and another study found that Trump's[ vile and violent tweets resulted in massive spikes in hate crimes against marginalized communities](https://substack.com/redirect/1e3cc7d9-163f-400e-a3f0-5d7862fcc1b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This is the man now surprised about the rise of political violence?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b3d895a-6b35-4d3b-ab5f-b9e0ef5723ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Therefore, while I am an optimist, I am also a realist. Thus, I have little faith that the MAGA movement, or Donald Trump, will have the 'come to Jesus' moment necessary to reform and rehabilitate. This is why it is more critical than ever before for those of us committed to political progress elevate our efforts to organize, volunteer, and elect people committed to justice and democracy. The United States has suffered through political violence before, and in that respect, this is not uncharted waters. However, standing idle is not an option. As Dr. King said, "_Those who love peace must learn to organize as effectively as those who love war._ "
MAGAs have made clear they believe in political violence. It is up to us to stop them with effective organizing and winning with votes at the ballot box.

name: JD Vance
subject: Honoring the victims of yesterday’s attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
We don't have much time

|
---
Peter, This isn't a request for a campaign donation or a petition. I'm not asking you to help a political organization. Some things are bigger than politics. One of those things is heroism. Yesterday was horrible. President Trump was nearly assassinated. One man is dead and many others injured as a result of this depraved attack. But we also saw a great deal of bravery and heroism. As President Trump stood up to reassure the crowd, lifting his fist in the air, everyday Americans, Trump supporters like you and me, were rushing to give aid and comfort to the wounded. They were heroes yesterday. We are blessed to live in a country like ours and to count people like that among our fellow citizens. [https://www.gofundme.com/f/president-trump-seeks-support-for-butler-pa-victims](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b11ae1dfed2548968af4cd5dbe170034&_e=4b1bbxXKz0wKgqpL-j7g5BXLqVKpIBB8rRx1wCkhQUzzPOxuNp95SDsL78cA3k1JBengJqqC87hkJiuFH5M6gKk4lqxjVPmNI_zBZeYVq6_1bgNxnxI8WDOcLn4viaKQtCjp951_QnvPuk-p2s-YrxX2ns6gFrGpMxwftDJvInxhqU0HzdEETbji3BMoODfRMiND_araWOZAji9LrKil3xP8-adFWEXrIjF9bW2OFBnlj6Qj4OFOBIEAWobIq-Ob2xFpl6eT10mzNUrkPex39A%3D%3D)

It's for those people, the victims of yesterday's attack, that I'm writing to you today. The Trump campaign has started a fundraiser for the victims and their families at this time of great need. I know, like me, you've already kept them in your prayers. Now I'm asking you, if you are able, to please join me in supporting these brave Americans. All donations will be directed to these great Americans as they grieve. Please consider donating if you're able. __
_JD Vance_

| Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc.
---

JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212

name: Angie Shepherd, Journeyman Alumni
subject: Your chance to transform lives through scripture
body:
Billions of people wake up each day without the comfort and guidance of the Word of God in their native language.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ec9487bac3cd49958b0e3b2e58cb75ee&_e=WWpKlJC_fQoqSEvYJSo1tHWCECUk74S8Ym02BLnKN1BFA01FRWyR4yyf5KwQWnPWwp8NH1-pPk6yDaRkVNow0Nc1Pwv0oMbg2DoW7cnivZt5s2qDy6xFOAVnEhGR9lf07MH9jGBsj-L0tBTozdfVpTIvu1mgS_RAg6ijlU79KhcLOB9KhnrbnDs9P_Z1CvT3iPQgYyO8ozq9_fBaOMcT_8xii57bWukcjtUkfzVsL6ycn2gQdz5hxTnHc4nMZRu_U_rsJf6DXjiSfGGc-AiEeBtr0KmNMc-ib7X2w2EE3EMxSOivk-iN9bY5mDUIaxOplmZikRiUXwqkyAyIMWB8Qk7NQinrfnpvws2uqeH1WdQ56DtUUn3creJ0pyx9NIUFHoTDfO-RzaoNp0idd_2EvQ%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

As followers of Jesus, we are all compelled to address a critical need that exists across the globe:**Billions of people wake up each day without the comfort and guidance of the Word of God in their native language.**

In some regions, entire communities have yet to receive a single verse of scripture, while others face a severe shortage of Bibles.

I'm reaching out to you because we believe that together, we can make a profound impact on the lives of those who are yearning for the transformative power of the gospel.

**Will you provide Bibles to people groups who have yet to hear God 's Word with a gift today?**

Our commitment to providing Bibles and Scripture portions to people and communities worldwide is unwavering. However, we recognize that we cannot do this alone. We need your help to ensure that the gospel reaches every corner of the world.

When you give today, you will:
* Not only pass a Bible along but potentially change lives eternally.
* Help support over 3,500 IMB missionaries on the ground, teaching the Bible and bringing hope to spiritually lost communities.
* Answer God's call to share His Word with those who have yet to hear it.

[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ec9487bac3cd49958b0e3b2e58cb75ee&_e=WWpKlJC_fQoqSEvYJSo1tHWCECUk74S8Ym02BLnKN1BFA01FRWyR4yyf5KwQWnPWwp8NH1-pPk6yDaRkVNow0Nc1Pwv0oMbg2DoW7cnivZt5s2qDy6xFOAVnEhGR9lf07MH9jGBsj-L0tBTozdfVpTIvu1mgS_RAg6ijlU79KhcLOB9KhnrbnDs9P_Z1CvT3iPQgYyO8ozq9_fBaOMcT_8xii57bWukcjtUkfzVsL6ycn2gQdz5hxTnHc4nMZRu_FQAOeDyApEZ63paUsJ-kSFTB3ytyUlLfVX1IhnjNl9vYCV92vNrZZy4JO6yE4MW-xp3BtVBOuBJvQQ8MZP91nJ31pPVI9bsuHQTtNkkldMRTz2aRy6Fk1YlyZ_g2TuI0yrpMNveG1rLiHhOUQjHklw%3D%3D)
You can click on the secure link below to make a donation of any amount and bring the transformative power of the gospel to those who need it the most.

[https://www.imb.org/generosity/gods-word-for-the-nations-confirmation/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ec9487bac3cd49958b0e3b2e58cb75ee&_e=WWpKlJC_fQoqSEvYJSo1tHWCECUk74S8Ym02BLnKN1BFA01FRWyR4yyf5KwQWnPWwp8NH1-pPk6yDaRkVNow0Nc1Pwv0oMbg2DoW7cnivZt5s2qDy6xFOAVnEhGR9lf07MH9jGBsj-L0tBTozdfVpTIvu1mgS_RAg6ijlU79KhcLOB9KhnrbnDs9P_Z1CvT3iPQgYyO8ozq9_fBaOMcT_8xii57bWukcjtUkfzVsL6ycn2gQdz5hxTnHc4nMZRu_RBHsOS5GsGAD-jGzq76f0DWi67avM3AiYmgBQrFrZvOJHyQXagfA2dHcU9g2Hv5gljov8PcT1GH6HqN_vKFvU4HxBrDyNmNWN0nSPwVzR0zjskD8OanhIcocRQNvgTSz-2r4yX1oq6TJCpTMamzhtg%3D%3D)

Your support is more than a financial contribution; it's a beacon of hope, a lifeline to those who have yet to experience the love and salvation found in Jesus Christ.

Thank you for considering this urgent call to action. Together, we can make a difference in the lives of countless individuals and communities worldwide.

In faith,

Angie Shepherd
Journeyman Alumni
Prayer and Missions Advocate

name: Sharon Tuley
subject: Katrina Pierson's Birthday Invitation
body:
Please reply to this email to RSVP (with number of guests) for planning
purposes. Even if you can't come for the entire event, please stop by to
celebrate with Katrina! This is a family friendly venue, there is a
fabulous playground for the children too!

[image: Screen Shot 2024-07-14 at 7.34.16 PM.png]

*Sharon Tuley*
*Senior Advisor to Katrina Pierson*

subject: the ONE food Jesus said to NEVER eat
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,

Time's almost up! Don't miss out on our C.S. Lewis
quiz.

Take the C.S. Lewis Quiz NOW

Our C.S. Lewis quiz closes on June 30th. We want to
make sure you get the chance to showcase your knowledge about
this influential Christian thinker.

Take the quiz now before it's too late!

C.S. Lewis was one of the 20th century's most
celebrated Christian thinkers and theologians. His brilliant
insights into Christian theology are still needed today.

Lewis's journey from atheism to Christianity is a
testament to the transformative power of the Gospel - he truly
took every thought captive for Christ.

See how much you already know about him, and maybe
learn a thing or two!

Take the C.S. Lewis quiz NOW before time runs out
to test your knowledge on one of the 20th Century's greatest
Christian thinkers! >>

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Republicans rightfully condemned the attack on Trump. Now they need to condemn ALL political violence
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Call on Republicans to denounce ALL political violence](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87f356e-7055-4075-af91-5f9c722f1cbe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12e13ccd-b71d-4356-b662-0dfeaaba5129/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republican leaders have rightfully condemned the attack on Donald Trump.

Yet they (including Trump) make jokes about the savage attack on Nancy Pelosi's husband. And they make up excuses (and wild lies) for the deadly assault on the Capitol on January 6th. And they continue to make veiled and not so veiled threats against Democratic leaders on a regular basis.

[We all need to come together to oppose violence](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18eb3930-27b1-4b1c-a831-876f0e2ac7ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and we would welcome Republicans to join with the rest of us who are already doing so, and tell their followers in clear language to do the same.

[**Please add your name, and call on Republicans to condemn ALL political violence.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T948c8939-a2f3-4991-b54f-7840ac78fee6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
