name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 🎆 Unraveling Ohio Schools, Fake News & China
body:
Jump into work on these pressing issues! We need you! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=99977543f8&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9c78d07a56&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
OHIO PARENTS ALERT!
FIX OUR PUBLIC SCHOOLS!
BECOME A BOARD MEMBER!
HERE'S HOW!**
---
|
Next year, in November of 2025, all public school districts in Ohio will have at least 2 school board seats up for re-election, or if there is no incumbent for the seat, up for election.

We need concerned citizens who are for parental rights, a return to the basics of education, and completely depoliticizing Ohio's public schools, to run for these school board seats.

Anyone can run & there is no need for any kind of special qualifications, experience, or skills. All that's needed is a desire & common sense.

And, the Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition (OSBCC) can help you every step of the way. 40% of the candidates they helped last election won!

If you are interested, or know someone who is, please, please, please make sure you (or they) visit the OSBCC website & register to start getting OSBCC's regular emails & training notices [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c3674fb64e&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below

If you (or they) are anxious to start preparing to run for a school board seat, go to (or have them go to) the contact page & send OSBCC an email or fill out the contact form [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=43357c6a1e&e=5c740fa3e2). The volunteers at OSBCC will get back to you to get you started off strong. It's not too early to start your campaign!

THANK YOU!
######
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1d47a1e32a&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|

---
| |

**CRITICAL NEEDS:
RADIO CALL-IN VOLUNTEERS!
LETTERS TO EDITOR VOLUNTEERS!**

_**"Everybody Should be Doing Something!
Nobody Should be Doing Nothing!"**_

---
|
**THIS IS A REPEAT FROM LAST WEEK. WE NEED MORE OF YOU TO JOIN US!**

[RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=41f112e358&e=5c740fa3e2) -and- [LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=37f5385960&e=5c740fa3e2)

We're developing two statewide working groups to use the legacy media to our advantage. We're looking for volunteers who can (and will) write & speak (call-in radio). The writing will be letters to the editor and opinion pieces ("Op-Ed"). The speaking will be calling into talk radio shows. This is a statewide effort we're already building-out across Ohio.

We're going to work on crafting consistent messaging across the state, so this will be a team effort - you won't be on your own! If you'd like to explore this volunteer opportunity, please fill out one (or both?) of the forms linked below. Thank you!

[**RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=df1c7a147a&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dd4c7ed126&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!
WEEK 8 • LESSON 8**

---
|
In May we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e0ca1c651c&e=5c740fa3e2)" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=64f4ae4d24&e=5c740fa3e2).

Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted **[Lesson 7](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dabb3ad0c6&e=5c740fa3e2).** This week, we're highlighting **[Lesson 8: China’s Silent War Requires Human Sacrifice and the Subjugation of Millions](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=768c8f2223&e=5c740fa3e2).**

[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f4b6764950&e=5c740fa3e2) will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b7846ba856&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access [**Lesson 8**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=064d871281&e=5c740fa3e2) of “**China’s Silent War on America** ” called **"China’s Silent War Requires Human Sacrifice and the Subjugation of Millions** ".

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 9, will be the first of 2 lessons focusing on local, state, and national politicians & policies which ultimately must drive the solutions to the problems **China’s Silent War on America** are causing._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2dd70ed348&e=5c740fa3e2)

clean_body: Jump into work on these pressing issues! We need you! | | | | This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation. Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed! BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US": | "Join Us!" | | | OHIO PARENTS ALERT! FIX OUR PUBLIC SCHOOLS! BECOME A BOARD MEMBER! HERE'S HOW! | Next year, in November of 2025, all public school districts in Ohio will have at least 2 school board seats up for re-election, or if there is no incumbent for the seat, up for election. We need concerned citizens who are for parental rights, a return to the basics of education, and completely depoliticizing Ohio's public schools, to run for these school board seats. Anyone can run & there is no need for any kind of special qualifications, experience, or skills. All that's needed is a desire & common sense. And, the Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition (OSBCC) can help you every step of the way. 40% of the candidates they helped last election won! If you are interested, or know someone who is, please, please, please make sure you (or they) visit the OSBCC website & register to start getting OSBCC's regular emails & training notices or by clicking on the image below If you (or they) are anxious to start preparing to run for a school board seat, go to (or have them go to) the contact page & send OSBCC an email or fill out the contact form . The volunteers at OSBCC will get back to you to get you started off strong. It's not too early to start your campaign! THANK YOU! | | | | | CRITICAL NEEDS: RADIO CALL-IN VOLUNTEERS! LETTERS TO EDITOR VOLUNTEERS! "Everybody Should be Doing Something! Nobody Should be Doing Nothing!" | THIS IS A REPEAT FROM LAST WEEK. WE NEED MORE OF YOU TO JOIN US! -and- We're developing two statewide working groups to use the legacy media to our advantage. We're looking for volunteers who can (and will) write & speak (call-in radio). The writing will be letters to the editor and opinion pieces ("Op-Ed"). The speaking will be calling into talk radio shows. This is a statewide effort we're already building-out across Ohio. We're going to work on crafting consistent messaging across the state, so this will be a team effort - you won't be on your own! If you'd like to explore this volunteer opportunity, please fill out one (or both?) of the forms linked below. Thank you! | | | | | KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS! CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA! WEEK 8 • LESSON 8 | In May we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web . Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “China’s Silent War on America ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted . This week, we're highlighting . will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio. Click or on the image below to access of “China’s Silent War on America ” called "China’s Silent War Requires Human Sacrifice and the Subjugation of Millions ". Next week's lesson, Lesson 9, will be the first of 2 lessons focusing on local, state, and national politicians & policies which ultimately must drive the solutions to the problems China’s Silent War on America are causing. THANK YOU! | | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | "💥 Your Voice Can Make an Impact NOW!" "🌭 Sausage Making: Political Science in Disguise?" "🌭 Sausage Making: Political Science in Disguise?" "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!" | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person mark@gfiohio.com 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Trump Assassination Attempt
body:
These are dark and difficult times in America. On Saturday, Donald Trump narrowly avoided an assassination attempt... | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=cf11406009&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| These are dark and difficult times in America.

On Saturday, Donald Trump narrowly avoided an assassination attempt from an unhinged 20-year old man at a rally in Pennsylvania. An innocent bystander was killed and others wounded.

I was stunned and shocked by the news.

I’m glad Trump survived and will by all accounts make a full recovery. Political violence has no place in America, and I unequivocally condemn it. We should be able to disagree without descending into hatred.

Hundreds of friends reached out to me concerned and saddened for what this means for our country.

We are no strangers to political violence in the United States. In the turbulent 1960s, JFK, Malcolm X, Martin Luther King and Robert Kennedy were all assassinated in the space of 5 years. I fear that we are heading back in that direction.

Political polarization has been rising for decades, and a rise in political violence accompanies declining democracies, which is what we now are. Scholars like Barbara Walter in “How Civil Wars Start” and Stephen Marche in “The Next Civil War” have been projecting this for quite some time.

In “**[The War on Normal People](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=94ceb46ae7&e=0f227c2ae3)** ” I wrote:

“There are about 300 million firearms in the United States, almost one for every man, woman and child. Disintegration is unlikely to be gentle.” The shooter was a troubled young man, of which we are not in short supply.

I feel awful for our country that we are here now.

There is a natural impulse to rally around the flag. Donald Trump was the favorite to win in November before this assassination attempt; that dynamic is even stronger now.

His supporters are enraged at this attempt and many blame the overheated rhetoric in our political landscape. They’re not wrong. The truth is that both sides routinely run down the other side in language that incites hostility and contempt. I wish it would stop.

After each event like this, there are those who appeal to cool down the temperature before returning to their partisan habits mere days later. Our muscle memory of tribalism is growing stronger and our institutions weaker.

History is slipping in the wrong direction. An innocent bystander was killed on Saturday. I fear he won’t be the last.

To help ease our polarization, check out **[Forward](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=083c489b6a&e=0f227c2ae3)** today. We need more than two sides.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=da6f6ce9cc&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=8f7775eb20&e=0f227c2ae3)

name: President Trump
subject: FEAR NOT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC Inc
body:
I will be giving an acceptance speech for President!

| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znmggncrm9nk728pl5qgv5c1v47dt5fk4qsk35l8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjie1p33cth2bs)
---
|
---
**_ALERT FROM TRUMP_**
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmhpilbpggv0o853m38p23ltsp19d0j57qpc69jo_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjie1p33cth2bs)
Based on yesterday’s terrible events, I was going to delay my trip to Wisconsin and the Republican National Convention by two days, but I have just decided not to let this force a change to any scheduling.
I am Donald J. Trump!
I will be giving an acceptance speech for President.
I will win this election.
Together, we will...
MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN 2024!
Unity. Peace. Save America.

[MAGA](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1pu77eumvdcd3m28vjab1k16fea3dltgbjhg2n8_rp22sh2s8i6eoj0cjie1p33cth2bs)

name: Defeat Republicans
subject: We condemn political violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Peter,

We at Defeat Republicans unequivocally condemn political violence. What happened yesterday was terrifying and must be denounced by everyone.

We've seen a disturbing rise in political violence over the past few years. From the January 6th insurrection, to the attack on Paul Pelosi in his own home, and now the recent assassination attempt on former President Donald Trump, our country is straying further from the democratic ideals our forefathers envisioned.

When we witness political violence, we must condemn it and demand better.

So, we are calling on Congress to pass comprehensive gun reform to prevent such tragedies from happening again. If you stand with us, click here to sign on. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: On yesterday’s act of political violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
#

Today, our nation is once again confronting political violence – and once again that violence has claimed an American life. Every citizen should mourn this loss, hope for the swift recovery of those injured, and condemn this hateful act.
Patriotic Americans solve their differences at the ballot box, not with violence and gunfire. And the way to defend American democracy is with hard work and vigorous advocacy.
We should all be incredibly thankful for the quick action of law enforcement, who ensured the former president was safe and the attacker was quickly dealt with. But the death and injuries in an act of political violence are a new stain on our nation.
There is a lot we still don’t know. But what we do know is disturbing, and that goes beyond what happened last night. America’s political climate is toxic. It’s become a zero-sum war, using the language of war to describe people who have different political views.
Violent threats targeting elected officials, civil servants, election administrators and members of the media are rampant and routine, and our democracy is at risk because of it. It is completely antithetical to how our Founders designed our system, which is rooted in the idea that rigorous debate of ideas makes our country stronger. If you care to protect our nation, we all need to commit to the peaceful resolution of our differences, and call out words and deeds that threaten violence.
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1651%2E135344%2EXs57cD).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Chuck Morse
subject: Our Unity is More Important Than Ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer
body:

---
| | Derek,
I couldn't believe it.
I was out on the campaign trail yesterday when I received the shocking news of the attempted assassination of President Donald J. Trump, the innocent bystander who lost his life, and the critical condition of Americans attending the rally. Susan and I ask that you join us in keeping all those affected by yesterday's attack, in our prayers.
As we continue to await further details, one thing is blatantly clear: **NOW IS THE TIME TO UNITE!** This election is bigger than just our race. We must elect Republicans up and down the ballot, and it will take your complete support to do it.
My team is already prioritizing volunteer efforts for State Senate, State Representative, and down-ballot candidates to get every Republican across the finish line this fall. Whether you're willing to run for office, volunteer your time or contribute financially, now is the time to take a stand.

body:
The French offered Democrats a lesson in democracy, before political violence reared its ugly head in America--likely spelling the end of (whatever remains of) our Republic

| |
---|---|---

# [The 2024 election was decided last night](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=146608181&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5ODU1OTksImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3NzU5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zUf8D6S1f3mOqfr08_cMYuwKolyXBQ4B8_P7QG98R5U)
### The French offered Democrats a lesson in democracy, before political violence reared its ugly head in America--likely spelling the end of (whatever remains of) our Republic
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Jul 14| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=146608181&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA4MTgxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMDk4NTU5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzIzNTc3NTk5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DMtilaMg9d_5tHoGMjDZGoOa8xX6hG3uGd0iD2z6BIw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=146608181&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5ODU1OTksImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3NzU5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zUf8D6S1f3mOqfr08_cMYuwKolyXBQ4B8_P7QG98R5U&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=146608181&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5ODU1OTksImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3NzU5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zUf8D6S1f3mOqfr08_cMYuwKolyXBQ4B8_P7QG98R5U)
---
| | [](https://substack..wIatBRQSEcdXPyO2vNG5Uev_ee_H53tYonPfEsLJy4k?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/the-2024-election-was-decided-last?utm_source=email&inbox=true)
---
In an earlier era, the Founders imported revolutionary ideals from the likes of French thinkers including Rousseau and Voltaire. When a union of French centrists and Leftists beat back the right wing in crucial elections earlier this month, they offered yet another roadmap for democracy in America--if America could manage to relieve itself of its political stupidity long enough to recognize it.
Alas, the ~~elites~~ morons leading the Democratic Party--who delivered us Clinton, Obama, _[and](https://substack.com/redirect/1512c8d7-96cb-4200-9398-3b4f0fda775b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/1512c8d7-96cb-4200-9398-3b4f0fda775b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), before more recently anointing Biden--are hardly ready to learn from their mistakes. Having done everything they possibly could to [derail](https://substack.com/redirect/0a13287c-2419-4c46-9d71-85c578bf15f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) democracy over the past 20 years, they found themselves in an increasingly untenable position as their chosen leader revealed his unfitness for office, yet resisted their calls for him to step aside.
_The same Democrats who created Trump in 2016, then made Biden the nominee in 2020 despite his demonstrable lack of support, now find themselves the victims of their own success. Having put Biden in the White House, they have now discovered their inability to drive him from it --even though Biden revealed himself on national television as unfit to lead._
Biden may have effectively lost the 2024 election months before it has even happened. And that was before an act of political violence propelled his opponent, an unrepentant would-be tyrant, into a new role as survivor. Today, Donald Trump is poised to return to the White House, ironically buoyed by the sympathy that yesterday's failed assassination attempt will inevitably invite.
_Help inform your friends --by sharing this post!_
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=146608181&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ2NjA4MTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MjA5ODU1OTksImV4cCI6MTcyMzU3NzU5OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zUf8D6S1f3mOqfr08_cMYuwKolyXBQ4B8_P7QG98R5U)
### **France follows the lessons of Lincoln**
President Abraham Lincoln delivered [a historic speech](https://substack.com/redirect/db274de3-0d52-493e-a3b5-4a5031f0746f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to an audience of 1,000 at the Illinois State Republican Convention on June 16, 1858. He went on to lose the Senate race for which he was campaigning at the time, and stoked fears that may have helped fuel the Civil War, while articulating a forceful and eloquent rejection of slavery--as well as political division.
Columbia University history professor Eric Foner has [explained](https://substack.com/redirect/ce6d7279-e167-4c3a-a3f9-b4fa1b99f96c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Lincoln's opponent, Senator Stephen Douglas (D-IL), "had been seeking a middle ground between North and South, some way of comprising on the slavery issue." Lincoln's speech, according to Foner, argued that "'No, there is no compromise.... You've got to be on one side or the other.' In effect, he's saying, 'I'm on the side of freedom and Douglas...is on the side of slavery.'"
Evoking the Bible, Lincoln [said](https://substack.com/redirect/db274de3-0d52-493e-a3b5-4a5031f0746f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> "A house divided against itself cannot stand. I believe this government cannot endure, permanently half slave and half free. I do not expect the Union to be dissolved--I do not expect the house to fall--but I do expect it will cease to be divided. It will become all one thing or all the other."
While Lincoln lost his race in 1858 to replace Douglas in the Senate, the Lincoln-Douglas debates made him a political star, preparing him for the 1860 presidential election, which he won.
Only seven years later, President Lincoln would die at the hands of an assassin wielding a gun. (Political violence in the U.S. is a disturbing theme to which we will return in a moment.)
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription**! To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f58tZ2wYODTMuH4qH8Dvi1hM5D3SEh44nZmAW29M_RM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=146608181)
166 years after Lincoln's "Divided Union" speech, another Republic across the Atlantic Ocean demonstrated how to put his prescient words into practice.
The French Republic held [historic elections](https://substack.com/redirect/5f92fbd9-c4bb-49d8-b7fc-7c30b2403b5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) earlier this month, called by President Emmanuel Macron in the wake of an electoral defeat in the European Union elections, and mere weeks before France hosts the Olympic Games. Macron's decision to call for elections may have been something of an "[own goal](https://substack.com/redirect/38a18dff-86f9-4428-aabb-66372baff23b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." After the first round of voting, it seemed like he had invited the destruction of the Republic that he had led at the hands of the right wing voices who dominated the first round.
Mercifully, between the first and second rounds of voting, centrists and [Leftists](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9fd555-e0d4-4ad7-996a-9dcb678f2681?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in France managed to hurdle their differences and come together by embracing a strategy of [tactical voting](https://substack.com/redirect/1caa64f9-9c09-4c34-869a-8596a98ce396?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to deny the right wing an electoral mandate. In electoral districts where multiple candidates faced each other, centrists and Leftists agreed to an alliance, inviting the third place voter-getters from the first round to step aside so that voters committed to democracy could coalesce behind a single voice.
By uniting the center and Left, France was able to hold at bay the fascism that has been rising around the world for the past decade, preserving the values of "Liberte, Egalite, Fraternite" that animated the French Republic over the past two & a half centuries.
It was a unity that Americans who support democracy desperately need to demonstrate--but have never found the fortitude to embrace or embody.
### **Democrats --yet again--kick democracy in the knees**
Long before Biden [embarrassed](https://substack.com/redirect/0ac42963-8dc3-43d8-8d6a-3a0d91dc6a26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) himself (and the entire country) on a national debate stage last month, the Democratic Party insiders who put him in the White House demonstrated their own ineptitude.
In 2016, they put Trump in office by [actively promoting](https://substack.com/redirect/1512c8d7-96cb-4200-9398-3b4f0fda775b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) him in the Republican primary, stupidly thinking that he would be an easy foil for Hillary Clinton to beat.
In 2020, they [intervened](https://substack.com/redirect/ae47c3a0-110e-4251-a167-c90bfa522303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to deny Democratic Party voters a chance to nominate Bernie Sanders (who enjoyed by far the [most support](https://substack.com/redirect/3396033c-b69d-4247-b489-facae9711f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) among any of the many candidates in a crowded primary field) in order to guard the interests of capital. It was the [same calculus](https://substack.com/redirect/449f4705-0aee-4b9f-89b5-2252d4cafe63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that drove Biden to the White House as Obama's Vice President in 2008.
Many of us said at the time that Democrats would rather lose with Biden than win with Bernie. As I [recently noted](https://substack.com/redirect/449f4705-0aee-4b9f-89b5-2252d4cafe63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we were right, while ahead of our time.
The same Democrats who created Trump in 2016, then made Biden the nominee in 2020 despite his demonstrable lack of support, now find themselves the victims of their own success. Having put Biden in the White House, they have now discovered their inability to drive him from it--even though Biden revealed himself on national television as unfit to lead.
Any number of [voices](https://substack.com/redirect/90bd0d79-33a3-4f96-a1d0-053001c4b04c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have clamored for Biden to step aside in order to allow a more qualified candidate to take his place. Others, ironically [including](https://substack.com/redirect/d51f8d5f-9860-43bd-a7c9-5b7e6fdaf47e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Bernie Sanders (et tu, Brutus?), have raced to defend him, inviting voters to set aside their well-justified concerns and instead trust Biden for no good reason.
Yet, demonstrating a nearly Trumpian dedication to himself (while tragically sacrificing his own political legacy), Biden has steadfastly [rejected](https://substack.com/redirect/e9342c69-a24f-4e8c-9cc3-3b44bcb06512?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every such plea for sanity, inviting Americans to instead ignore their senses and embrace political dogma, instead. We already saw how well that worked out in 2016.
Some have called for Vice President Kamala Harris, in particular, to take Biden's place.
Given that she was [unable](https://substack.com/redirect/d8313b31-2227-4437-b40f-4b90d329fdca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to win a single state primary [when she ran](https://substack.com/redirect/48cb99f0-6677-4bfb-886a-5030c6599177?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the White House in 2020 against fellow Democrats, however, it seems preposterous to imagine that Harris could win the White House in a general election contest against Trump. Her racial and gender demographics make her a stronger candidate, rather than a weaker one, but two seemingly insurmountable challenges confront a potential Harris candidacy.
First, her record poses a similar challenge to Biden's: neither of them can attract support from the grassroots progressives on whom Democrats rely in national elections. Having shared a city with Harris years before she went to Washington, I have long observed the unfortunate conservativism of her ideology despite the values she espouses in her rhetoric. She served as a [predatory](https://substack.com/redirect/4b952127-95ec-4f6b-817c-2c25f9d1e7d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) prosecutor at both the local and state level before going to Washington.
Second, the Democratic Party is [no less besieged by racism](https://substack.com/redirect/0a13287c-2419-4c46-9d71-85c578bf15f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and sexism than the Republican Party. I learned that [the hard way](https://substack.com/redirect/736ffd3d-d414-41a5-b23b-aa098fbdfa9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and suspect that those dynamics would confront Harris undiminished by her service as Vice President.
Yet--while Harris has frequently [disappointed](https://substack.com/redirect/b223f92c-2d3d-4fbe-99e2-7fa3dec66d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) supporters, and repeatedly invited [mockery](https://substack.com/redirect/e27c22c9-a581-4714-a9a3-9e1c5f0635ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for her futile attempts to emulate Barack Obama--she has yet to deliver a political performance as undeniably abysmal as the one that Biden did in late June.
Despite Harris' various challenges, she would certainly be a stronger candidate than Biden. Between his debate performance and disqualifying [support for a preventable genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/d3943394-1c3f-440a-8e08-581cc14a7c1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he might actually be _the least_ plausible Democrat in the country to run for the White House in November.
It's not only that Democrats, like Mary Shelly's Dr. Frankenstein, can't control their own creation in Biden. The party has also taken steps to suppress reasonable dissent. Many Democrats have indicated that they [fear](https://substack.com/redirect/ac2540e6-a955-4589-9ec6-81e9fca19a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to speak out in public about the dire need for Biden to step aside, essentially because the "Democratic" party is anything but democratic.
Having worked for the relatively [conservative](https://substack.com/redirect/3ea905b6-690c-4277-b61d-72998b92930d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Democratic administration of Barack Obama, the hosts of Pod Save America are ironic messengers for political sanity. Even they, however, have [described](https://substack.com/redirect/fbb92b20-2075-4c04-8b09-1b9b4656326f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Biden's insistence on staying in the race as "fucking insane" and "really stupid shit."
The mere fact that stating the obvious reality--that Biden can't possibly win another national election--has fallen to them, of all people, is itself a reflection of how absurd U.S. politics has become.
### **A shot heard 'round the world**
The [shooting](https://substack.com/redirect/6988653e-a0b2-49ec-baaf-fba7bb72ffdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that targeted Donald Trump at yesterday's campaign rally in Pennsylvania has ironically breathed new life into his campaign--and will likely assure his victory in November if Biden stays in the race.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aa46f3bb-4258-4552-8bd6-cdecde0a2b9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was bad enough before, when Trump faced a candidate whose grasp on the issues appeared feeble at best, and who has saddled himself with a record of [supporting](https://substack.com/redirect/d3943394-1c3f-440a-8e08-581cc14a7c1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an internationally illegal genocide that has alienated many of his potential supporters. It is worse now, as Trump's allies claim [justifiable outrage](https://substack.com/redirect/b26c60d7-8312-4b35-9f56-856dcf84d907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the wake of political violence and spread disinformation leveraging it.
Trump's first term in office was an unmitigated disaster for the United States. His policies [undermined](https://substack.com/redirect/7e19f011-527c-4d3d-9383-f26982deaaba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) human rights, his rhetoric [invited](https://substack.com/redirect/4dd53642-e7b3-4342-9b42-2e2a4eee8583?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) racialized violence, and his [statements](https://substack.com/redirect/14879a30-5fdb-42cf-aa32-6f599825b2b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during the 2024 re-election campaign suggest that he plans to [escalate](https://substack.com/redirect/21c804de-3d54-4b08-8a11-6443cd2f45c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his attacks on longstanding constitutional norms.
Whatever motivated the shot that grazed Trump yesterday, it has already produced a [wave of sympathy](https://substack.com/redirect/bdf70d35-327a-4334-8ed7-8357928aa106?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). His unsurprising [endorsement](https://substack.com/redirect/700b8613-9853-4558-b8d0-837e09984bda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by one of the world's most wealthy robber barons is one (among too many) examples.
The sympathy that Trump will gain from the attack on his life will likely buoy his fundraising and polling results. And, ultimately, it will likely land him back in the White House.
_Paid subscribers can access a discussion of the disinformation responding to yesterday 's attempt on Trump's life. Beyond Biden's refusal to step aside despite his embarrassing public performances, the Democratic Party's refusal to accept dissent, and the attack on Trump in Pennsylvania, the rising tide of disinformation represents a further threat confronting democracy in America that our country remains poorly poised to address..._

name: American Action News
subject: Rudy Giuliani’s Bankruptcy Case Thrown Out By Federal Judge
body:

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: A call for change
body:
https://www.tamiewilson.com/ [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]
Friends,
Like many of you I watched last night as the video came across about the terrible shooting at a Trump rally in Pennsylvania.
My thoughts and prayers are with Donald Trump, and I am relieved that he wasn’t seriously hurt.
I am heartbroken for everyone affected by the attack and deeply saddened by the current state of our nation. This moment underscores the urgent need to unite against hate, division, and violence.
It's time to turn down the rhetoric. Words of hate and violence have consequences. Political violence has no place in our country.
We must come together as one nation to condemn it and recommit ourselves to civility and respect for each other and our politics.
As Americans, we have the power to shape our future and the direction of our country.
I am running for office to bring peace and positive change to our government and nation. UNITED WE CAN rise above and make a difference.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: ICYMI...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dr
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Header.png]
It's time to end division.
For 35 months, I've been positively campaigning and engaging in a new dialogue with our rural neighbors. Now, more than ever, we need a uniter in our district, and I'm ready and honored to lead that charge.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad]
We deserve leadership that fiercely advocates for true progress, someone committed to ending the divide.
To get to Congress and bring experience, dignity, and integrity back to this seat, I need your help hitting our mid-month goal of airing our latest ad ahead of the primary election on Tuesday, Aug. 6.
WATCH OUR LATEST AD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad]
Friends,
As a resident here for over 35 years, I have dedicated my life to public service as a doctor, diplomat, public health professional, social worker, and educator.
We have campaigned hard since August 2021 and made huge strides, but our work is unfinished. We cannot afford to abandon momentum.
I have fundamental policy differences with my opponents, but we are competitors, not enemies.
The fact remains that Michigan's first district has been underserved for far too long. Rep. Bergman has never faced a second-time challenger, and we have the best opportunity to defeat him democratically and finally bring about meaningful change.
Together, united, we can expel extremism, hatred, and violence and make our district stronger, kinder, and more prosperous.
For our freedoms, families, and futures, it would be the honor of my life to be your representative. Thank you for your continued generosity.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julyad]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
Paid for by Friends of Dr. Bob

Thank you for your continued generosity. -Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 CONTRIBUTE [] [] Or, send a check to Friends of Dr. Bob PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States Paid for by Friends of Dr. Bob

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I Addressed The Attempted Assassination Of Trump From The Pulpit Today At Sheridan.Church
body:
Today, I addressed the attempted assassination of President Trump from behind the pulpit at Sheridan.Church. I believe as a Pastor, I have a responsi
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6888.1.b78ccba874b6f4cb4c349bcffd21c944) |
---
Today, I addressed the _attempted assassination_ of **President Trump** from behind the pulpit at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6889.1.d27a6deb1cde350c2720dcc6a206ad67). I believe as a Pastor, I have a responsibility to speak about what we as a people are faced with and how the Church in America should respond. Yesterday, **we were 1 inch away from the start of a Civil War**. Thank God for his hand of protection on President Trump. Trump is _NOT_ lucky. **He is anointed.** Watch my full remarks here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/1eV97EF2yXY?si=lgT2fOGNz85lpOiy&t=2067](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6890.1.46d539272a0e35674d00a64959b1b201) **Special Upcoming Events At[Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6891.1.2bcbe8ab75b87b947265f008ce89d0b6):** -Wed, Jul 17 @7pm: **LIVE Q &A w/Dr. Randy Caldwell** -July 22-24: **Vacation Bible School** (pre-k - 5th): Link to register: [www.sheridan.church/vbs](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6892.1.d01e291513db91e12711f2a70d5910fb) -Fri, Jul 26 @6:30pm: **[Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6893.1.fcd004de794e083199b7b129f24b0d1d)** \- RSVP: [CLICK HERE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6894.1.c7073bf4c09f25ee368b93d775aec6c8) -Sep 8-11: **IGNITE 2024** w/[Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6895.1.df78cf0dcfffa922dabb002f48287c90), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6896.1.471ef8d3b629ffeee5798eddc91ca35f), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6897.1.5ebe46d04b15b14b6b54bd3946d06d35) & [Bishop Darrell Hines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6898.1.a2ac80002441724b5fecc72868c7b4a8) -Thur, Oct 24 @6:30pm: **Fox News Host** [Pete Hegseth](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6899.1.1024840de49f0861197fa32d6ee93ba0) RSVP: [https://www.sheridan.church/events ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6900.1.db039128540667255df07d4b439a5157) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6901.1.c9c7fc101497057413ee3b4c66b01c3d), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6902.1.9f1b9c4483adac3c9384747076938244), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6903.1.919a6d899e4ad752df32af7cf02f8065), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6904.1.cc38c57d0e3eb15445bbe5d68a3273b0), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6905.1.910cf64b8667e68842d020f838cfceaf), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6906.1.709c8820620d84b993db336ffdab0391)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6907.1.ff43448b99dd4d68bdbb216eb714a7d5)
---

Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/V3tfLXQsnKc](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=13282036.6919.1.d9361637ef9e6c5104ffba29648fe77e)

Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

I know Trump and his cronies are doing everything they can to take you down, so please know that local Democrats such as myself stand with you.

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Counter the 1619 Project
body:
I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=6420b15f32b54d6886ddac7a72416da2&_t=84-K-iPf7bUfm3bTJMU5_ce0DxDftM-CedBQlY8eXYL_rkQ0W1SJHE7k8WQs8OWwRN4-3NwyVI6cU3M85wWlnGfY7bXdfnHTrqAE5DxqTOb3fRHQvrIbmcGGD9m8-UQc)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6420b15f32b54d6886ddac7a72416da2&_e=O_WK8xkZM_Lxq8-NM08owd_eelTudohULMv4U33MBZqzEsaov0VtJTpHy4EGn0TZxO4leVFkhqzhuRJGrp5HxAPKXFVLnGA7cUlP4tHH9UhoB9m2Tde2GKCgAcOsSeZNWGKY_4f51HUg38_faPLfZ57NPivx8TOPlA0cdB7LGp3pq0gTbiHO5k3DEgZzqsnpAT9Sv8QgdYfKuEfzyj62-4wiJSZ7ATq9Sj0b-R_JBGmEzJQvBYeelZi-dSqmpkQi3sSYlaZbOOkEcn9RbHRJv5cwiH96IRumXndg8wsi5eWpqDEz_f4_T0lg0pGq2yT-URGtvXGooaYcGPS1p6eqKohnog45fPL1VgdtukZ6XhkzwkbYVlEglGfc2CNevamXJApz7cRFjrk3YmcNQVcPBK2MVcIYKrpthv44fpH4zac%3D) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you're having a great day so far. I'm reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I'm talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course ["The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,"](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=6420b15f32b54d6886ddac7a72416da2&_e=O_WK8xkZM_Lxq8-NM08owd_eelTudohULMv4U33MBZqzEsaov0VtJTpHy4EGn0TZxO4leVFkhqzhuRJGrp5HxAPKXFVLnGA7cUlP4tHH9UhoB9m2Tde2GKCgAcOsSeZNWGKY_4f51HUg38_faPLfZ57NPivx8TOPlA0cdB7LGp3pq0gTbiHO5k3DEgZzqsnpAT9Sv8QgdYfKuEfzyj62-4wiJSZ7ATq9Sj0b-R_JBGmEzJQvBYeelZi-dSqmpkQi3sSYlaZbOOkEcn9RbHRJv_v9KIuCXFPB-q8I6Dm3GV7RAUQPFvF-5NHO3T2e2AdbtScofk5MJWQEBSNCA0fRDm-Bfcle-VF25lKOZmF7d8Lctxo5nJm37uFNEL-GD3Ttq73j1e9IMnFiZxneIWP0YhYlQ83vjX_w5ZkyNJZcCSg%3D) studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project," now a multi-part series streaming online. The "1619 Project" locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery--and the project's main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Political violence is terrifying. I know.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Dear friends,
Yesterday, we witnessed an assassination attempt on the former president of the United States.
Political violence is un-American and never, ever acceptable.
And it’s terrifying—I know. 13 years ago, I was a Congresswoman from Arizona, hosting an event to meet with my constituents outside of a Safeway in Tucson. A gunman, filled with hatred, tried to assassinate me. 18 people were shot, and six died. Our lives changed forever, and I founded GIFFORDS to save others from experiencing what my family—and Tucson—did that day.
No other elected official or candidate for public office should have to worry about being shot while doing their job. Nobody should be worried about gunshots ringing through the crowd—whether it’s a rally, or an event outside a supermarket.
We must unequivocally condemn political violence, and continue our work for a safer future.
Thank you for standing with me,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=8500%2E3935704%2Enn4N3t) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: | | | Peter, I want YOU to step up to the challenge. It won’t be easy, but I believe in you and I believe in this team. Peter, Team Cao is counting on YOU to step up. Every dollar we raise counts in our razor-thin race. Tim Kaine is already SCRAMBLING - and if we meet this goal, it could push us over the edge. Election day is closer than ever, and if we’re going to win, we must meet every single goal from now until November. We CAN take back the Senate, but not without every one of us doing our part. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | Hung Cao: I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it to America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything. The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in Special Operations in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. We are fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Even just a dollar or two makes all the difference.Thank you for standing with us! | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: A more respectful and unified America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Friends — The events of the last 24 hours have shocked and saddened us all. As we grapple with the implications of the tragic killing of an innocent bystander and the attempted assassination of the former president, this moment serves as a stark reminder of the dangers posed by extreme rhetoric and division. In the coming days, I urge all of us to engage in political conversations with a renewed sense of respect and understanding. We have the power to change the tone of our national discourse. Let us lead by example in our conversations, both online and offline. Now, more than ever, we must remember that our political opponents are not our enemies. They are fellow Americans, with their own hopes, fears, and dreams for this country. Our democracy depends on our ability to disagree without demonizing one another. Thank you for your continued support and your commitment to a more respectful and unified America. — Martin
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---

body:

| | **🚨 Join Me Tomorrow for An Appeal to Heaven Rally in St. Charles****🚨**
* * *
In light of yesterday's assassination attempt against President Trump, I am calling on all Missourians to join me in An Appeal to Heaven.

I am hosting a prayer rally for our state and nation tomorrow at 12:00 PM, in St. Charles at The Soda Museum.

Join us as we unite together in prayer. Lunch will be provided.

An [RSVP](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=f7ee8311bc&e=c00a6982d2) is not required, but it will help my team know how much food to order.

name: JD Vance
subject: Why I believe what I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
I haven't told you this in a while

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=2835af7e78df4468a40c58dea607bb0f&_e=gN2N4TJ6GTJO5dzHwRRodKbYRGOJvShc2IukWxGo2QlxYi6p7ofueOcKAPLQp7XG5V89B-NQ3Al5UijfOnzyETKIxmf9EeSm6Cq-PTc1IVjcS-pcGOfKboHYKYVSod1G1vJSglvsIjq8Oorc-B2MVfWQbF4LB6Hx7HTWD1AVlpOSUtPfW-bqXGasXhvap0xRDeXvUWZSKb82MgTsfAQyyRP4byR_dF7T9W1cfWQWSzFAz3tRNMtXwe0JcmC1GgcPwWL-OwwpPOYls78hK3uSJV4RCcRukPqa48mgRgAsHHkjCrflJ42y67X6jQ84b8oyNPXP5p2cdFmm1KwtkJx7Ow%3D%3D)
---
Hi Peter,

**_I haven 't introduced myself in a while, and I want you to know why I believe what I do. _**

I spent my childhood in Middletown, Ohio, in a working-class family. I didn't have all the glamor that most people in politics have growing up; let me tell you, there were no silver spoons in our household.

I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw, and they taught me the nobility of hard work.

In my hometown, I saw my friend's parents hard at work in the factories. These same manufacturing jobs are now in danger of being ripped from our grasp because of China and bad trade deals absolutely destroying the manufacturing sector.

Washington Elites have failed at protecting most Americans. Career politicians are focused on big dollar donors, focused on pleasing their friends, and pushing their own swampy agendas. **They 've never cared about taxing your small businesses, protecting your rights, or preventing the crises facing middle America. **

This is why I knew I had to run for office. I was determined to stand up to this record of failure and fight for working Americans. I'm looking out for the Americans like the ones I grew up with, the ones left behind by those who promised to look out for them.

It's the honor of a lifetime to serve this great country and the Buckeye State, but I can't keep doing it without your support.

clean_body: I haven't told you this in a while | Hi Peter, I haven 't introduced myself in a while, and I want you to know why I believe what I do. I spent my childhood in Middletown, Ohio, in a working-class family. I didn't have all the glamor that most people in politics have growing up; let me tell you, there were no silver spoons in our household. I was raised by my Mamaw and Papaw, and they taught me the nobility of hard work. In my hometown, I saw my friend's parents hard at work in the factories. These same manufacturing jobs are now in danger of being ripped from our grasp because of China and bad trade deals absolutely destroying the manufacturing sector. Washington Elites have failed at protecting most Americans. Career politicians are focused on big dollar donors, focused on pleasing their friends, and pushing their own swampy agendas. They 've never cared about taxing your small businesses, protecting your rights, or preventing the crises facing middle America. This is why I knew I had to run for office. I was determined to stand up to this record of failure and fight for working Americans. I'm looking out for the Americans like the ones I grew up with, the ones left behind by those who promised to look out for them. It's the honor of a lifetime to serve this great country and the Buckeye State, but I can't keep doing it without your support. | Thank you, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. name: your signature requested (via protectvoting.org)
subject: President Biden needs you now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters >>
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71687?t=6&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F) **President Biden’s momentum is SURGING — this is exactly what we need as we enter the last 4 months to Election Day!**

[**We can’t let our progress slip, so we’re sending a letter to President Biden standing with him in his fight to save our democracy! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71687?t=7&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71687?t=8&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,

_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last three and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republicans isn’t easy, especially with them ramping up their attacks to defeat you.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71687?t=9&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/71687?t=10&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F)
---
**_X A GRATEFUL DEMOCRAT_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=15594%2E878179%2EmZRM4F)

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Consider...
body:
You have been selected to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=279b230bbe6e40388fad234c27389758&_t=dEMT9LfoMWNp_-tsZWmAFINCpTXlNsFs4zAyEkYKQ_tsE1_-DQPJGCvpjbY9louDoN0XGd3yoAhWah-WE0wJPA6dwaggSyTAAtlKFxMAAINsflEHNhfWQOWN6aAnI1fX)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=279b230bbe6e40388fad234c27389758&_e=DUpwiNeGSdDtnclDg9PxWyZf0nGY5ijFSnpg4kvZbRYPnoxgrrnRi4w6OgcuZ1FiwPtXIjL4SF7xteuZm-0vkplpk_CROILBKEdBQIcvsKY-dqiHejOqPSWdn8ufUsopBZKdMcz0662LRhv5dlkwXHojgCpfg8STqvwWHM3xiPYbNpfLiKIn2hy4Qr-xGm2cmn9TGN5a2m08TgFjHcmK8UgYqFSs1zs-j-_wfpDMl9EZvGycTiTKE0Lewy3Apm1jOd-P1QhMBDm6KiRYxQO8ST9YxX5k46Thd4sH-851xUZr2HnkA4PO-vaB813GsLsRP2saUcY8BVMwskiulAhd69Et6E2ZMS4hDrdt4Y0xVASOt3vZdDYCaY80owGgOHWYOth5Z6AreOocgep0zs3hiBavj0R9m7smqSP_hX4_H1w%3D)

Dear Friend,

You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty.

Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below:

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=279b230bbe6e40388fad234c27389758&_e=DUpwiNeGSdDtnclDg9PxWyZf0nGY5ijFSnpg4kvZbRYPnoxgrrnRi4w6OgcuZ1FiwPtXIjL4SF7xteuZm-0vkplpk_CROILBKEdBQIcvsKY-dqiHejOqPSWdn8ufUsopBZKdMcz0662LRhv5dlkwXHojgCpfg8STqvwWHM3xiPYbNpfLiKIn2hy4Qr-xGm2cmn9TGN5a2m08TgFjHcmK8UgYqFSs1zs-j-_wfpDMl9EZvGycTiTKE0Lewy3Apm1jOd-P1QhMBDm6KiRYxQO8Sc6BcUS5_uiQtitvrZJyLBFiJTGs13se3BbbnSy0Xvi7QKw66T3hI0qfYJN73Fi2B9-iR6NRwRC2WDu1WTwsfid-8XCFaGvP4WD0WdA7VrGnYAj8nVZ_6Vf6R1xXT-XpmJvQk0F53vBttxwLyWE4UpU%3D)

Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."**

Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion."

These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties.

You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course.

**The first step is ...EDUCATION.**

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.**

These efforts include:

**Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.**

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=279b230bbe6e40388fad234c27389758&_e=DUpwiNeGSdDtnclDg9PxWyZf0nGY5ijFSnpg4kvZbRYPnoxgrrnRi4w6OgcuZ1FiwPtXIjL4SF7xteuZm-0vkplpk_CROILBKEdBQIcvsKY-dqiHejOqPSWdn8ufUsopBZKdMcz0662LRhv5dlkwXHojgCpfg8STqvwWHM3xiPYbNpfLiKIn2hy4Qr-xGm2cmn9TGN5a2m08TgFjHcmK8UgYqFSs1zs-j-_wfpDMl9EZvGycTiTKE0Lewy3Apm1jOd-P1QhMBDm6KiRYxQO8SeKIiqcqvAtFFRxUR5qPsmIN5H13IF0GAW4SKIwqKJMzUQquBmIqZxlxfYrRh4Jm5GZmWoYiftNuoKKoMFvSetW_z9a_HA-x1qJ0PdzQZgvR34CIZL4BJSgrQQtkcGOKaZwsenYbgkGvMsBjWowsogU%3D)

Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=279b230bbe6e40388fad234c27389758&_t=dEMT9LfoMWNp_-tsZWmAFINCpTXlNsFs4zAyEkYKQ_tsE1_-DQPJGCvpjbY9louDoN0XGd3yoAhWah-WE0wJPMuZy-DA77nzyugKhZ2HlQSVC9zQ6OK3AOocq5dmS2qkRSQRrR7cdDq0EBLqo4XXHN1lPPZxSW58mxTVnh4uCAE%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=279b230bbe6e40388fad234c27389758&_t=dEMT9LfoMWNp_-tsZWmAFINCpTXlNsFs4zAyEkYKQ_tsE1_-DQPJGCvpjbY9louDoN0XGd3yoAhWah-WE0wJPA6dwaggSyTAAtlKFxMAAINsflEHNhfWQOWN6aAnI1fX).
---

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Some thoughts on the horrific attack last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=7061%2E5257348%2Er4x8-j)
Derek —
The assassination attempt on former President Trump at his rally in Pennsylvania was horrifying. Just horrifying. And it must be condemned by all Americans. Unequivocally.
It is a day that will be etched in our memory and mark another terrible milestone in the history of our country — when there was yet another attempted assassination of a political leader.
The loss of life of a spectator at the rally, and the injury of others who were merely exercising their right to hear from a presidential candidate, compounds the tragedy.
**_There is no place for political violence in our democracy. Absolutely none._**
Without the swift action of law enforcement and the Secret Service, I fear the attack could have been so much worse. We all thank them.
But we all have a role to play in making sure that this attack does not result in more violence, that, as a nation, we step back from the abyss and pledge to resolve our differences peacefully.
We must join together in condemning this horrific attack, in praying for the innocent life lost and the grieving families, and in wishing a swift recovery to those injured, including President Trump.
In this country, in our democracy, we deal with our differences by making our voices heard at the ballot box. Never resorting to political violence.
In the coming days, I hope we can lower the temperature of political discourse and rededicate ourselves to the peaceful competition of ideas.
Thanks,
Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=7061%2E5257348%2Er4x8-j) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=7061%2E5257348%2Er4x8-j)**
